title: The Lightning Thief
author: Rick Riordan
description: Twelve-year-old Percy Jackson discovers he is the son of Poseidon, the Greek god of the sea, and is thrust into a world of mythology he never knew existed. Accused of stealing Zeus's master lightning bolt, Percy must travel across America with his friends Annabeth and Grover to find the real thief and prevent a war among the gods. Along the way, he battles monsters from ancient Greek legends and uncovers a treacherous plot that reaches the heights of Mount Olympus. This action-packed first book in the Percy Jackson series is a thrilling blend of modern adventure and timeless mythology.

title: The Sea of Monsters
author: Rick Riordan
description: Percy Jackson's second year at Camp Half-Blood takes a dangerous turn when the magical borders protecting the camp begin to fail. To save their home, Percy and his friends must journey to the legendary Sea of Monsters, known to mortals as the Bermuda Triangle, to find the Golden Fleece. Joined by his new Cyclops half-brother Tyson, Percy faces deadly challenges including the terrifying Charybdis and the cunning sorcerer Circe. This fast-paced sequel deepens the mythology and raises the stakes as an ancient prophecy begins to unfold.

title: The Titan's Curse
author: Rick Riordan
description: When Percy Jackson and his friends rescue two powerful half-blood siblings from a dangerous school, the goddess Artemis goes missing while hunting a fearsome monster. Percy joins the quest to find her, but a chilling prophecy warns that not everyone will survive the journey. The group must trek across the country, facing the might of the Titan general Atlas and his deadly forces. With new allies and old enemies, this third Percy Jackson adventure delivers heart-pounding action and a stunning revelation about the prophecy of the Great Prophecy.

title: The Battle of the Labyrinth
author: Rick Riordan
description: Percy Jackson isn't expecting freshman orientation to be any fun, but when a mysterious mortal acquaintance appears, pursued by demon cheerleaders, things quickly go from bad to worse. Time is running out for Percy. War between the gods and the Titans is drawing near. Even Camp Half-Blood isn't s...

title: The Last Olympian
author: Rick Riordan
description: The final battle between the Olympian gods and the Titan lord Kronos has arrived, and Percy Jackson stands at the center of it all. As Kronos leads his army in a massive assault on Manhattan and Mount Olympus itself, Percy must rally every demigod, nature spirit, and ally he can find. Armed with the knowledge of a terrifying prophecy about his sixteenth birthday, Percy faces impossible choices that will determine the fate of the world. This epic conclusion to the Percy Jackson series brings together all the characters and storylines in a thrilling, emotional finale.

title: The Lost Hero
author: Rick Riordan
description: Jason has a problem. He doesn’t remember anything before waking up on a school bus holding hands with a girl. Apparently she’s his girlfriend Piper, his best friend is a kid named Leo, and they’re all students in the Wilderness School, a boarding school for “bad kids.” What he did to end up here,...

title: The Son of Neptune
author: Rick Riordan
description: Percy is confused. When he awoke from his long sleep, he didn't know much more than his name. His brain fuzz is lingering, even after the wolf Lupa told him he is a demigod and trained him to fight with the pen/sword in his pocket. Somehow Percy manages to make it to a camp for half-bloods, despi...

title: The Mark of Athena
author: Rick Riordan
description: The Greek and Roman demigods must unite to face the rising threat of Gaea, the earth goddess who plans to destroy the world. Annabeth is given a solo quest to follow the Mark of Athena, a challenge that has defeated every child of Athena for centuries. Meanwhile, the crew of the Argo II sails across the Mediterranean, encountering ancient foes and forging new alliances. This third Heroes of Olympus book builds to a shocking cliffhanger that will leave readers desperate for the next chapter.

title: The House of Hades
author: Rick Riordan
description: After their terrifying fall into Tartarus, Percy and Annabeth must fight their way through the underworld's darkest realm to reach the Doors of Death. Meanwhile, the rest of the Argo II crew faces their own deadly trials as they race to meet Percy and Annabeth on the other side. Each hero must confront their deepest fears and greatest weaknesses in order to survive. This fourth Heroes of Olympus book is the most intense and emotionally gripping installment yet, pushing every character to their limits.

title: The Blood of Olympus
author: Rick Riordan
description: Nico had warned them. Going through the House of Hades would stir the demigods' worst memories. Their ghosts would become restless. Nico may actually become a ghost if he has to shadow-travel with Reyna and Coach Hedge one more time. But that might be better than the alternative: allowing someone...

title: The Red Pyramid
author: Rick Riordan
description:
Since their mother’s death, Carter and Sadie have become near strangers.  While Sadie has lived with her grandparents in London, her brother has traveled the world with their father, the brilliant Egyptologist, Dr. Julius Kane.

One night, Dr. Kane brings the siblings together for a “research e...

title: The Throne of Fire
author: Rick Riordan
description: Carter and Sadie Kane have only five days to find and awaken the sun god Ra before the chaos serpent Apophis breaks free and destroys the world. Their quest takes them from the streets of London to the depths of the Egyptian underworld, where they must battle gods, demons, and magicians who want to stop them. Along the way, the siblings discover new powers and forge unlikely alliances in the dangerous world of Egyptian magic. This second Kane Chronicles adventure is packed with mythology, humor, and nonstop action that will keep readers turning pages.

title: The Serpent's Shadow
author: Rick Riordan
description: He's b-a-a-ack! Despite their best efforts, Carter and Sadie Kane can't seem to keep Apophis, the chaos snake, down. Now Apophis is threatening to plunge the world into eternal darkness, and the Kanes are faced with the impossible task of having to destroy him once and for all. Unfortunately, the...

title: The Sword of Summer
author: Rick Riordan
description: Magnus Chase has been living on the streets of Boston since his mother's mysterious death, but his life takes an unimaginable turn when he dies in battle against a fire giant on the Longfellow Bridge. Waking up in Valhalla, the Norse afterlife for fallen warriors, Magnus discovers he is the son of a Norse god and has been chosen for an important quest. He must find the legendary Sword of Summer before the forces of chaos can use it to start Ragnarok, the end of the world. This thrilling first book in the Magnus Chase series brings Norse mythology to life with Rick Riordan's signature wit and adventure.

title: The Hammer of Thor
author: Rick Riordan
description:
"Magnus Chase, you nearly started Ragnarok. What are you going to do next?"

It's been six weeks since Magnus and his friends returned from defeating Fenris Wolf and the fire giants. Magnus has adjusted to life at the Hotel Valhalla—as much as a once-homeless and previously alive kid can. As a ...

title: The Ship of the Dead
author: Rick Riordan
description: Magnus Chase and his friends must stop the Norse god Loki from sailing Naglfar, the Ship of the Dead, to the shores of Asgard and starting Ragnarok. To prevent the end of the world, Magnus must challenge Loki to a flyting, a deadly Norse insult contest, which he has no idea how to win. Along the way, the crew of the Big Banana faces giants, dragons, and other terrifying Norse creatures. This thrilling conclusion to the Magnus Chase trilogy is packed with humor, mythology, and nonstop adventure.

title: Into the Wild
author: Erin Hunter
description: Rusty is an ordinary house cat with a longing for the wild forest beyond his garden fence. When he ventures into the woods, he is invited to join ThunderClan, one of four Clans of wild cats who roam the forest and live by a warrior code. As Rusty takes on the new name Firepaw and begins his warrior training, he must earn the trust of his Clanmates while navigating rivalries and a dangerous enemy within the ranks. A mysterious prophecy from StarClan foretells that fire alone will save the Clan, and Firepaw may be the key to ThunderClan's survival.

title: Fire and Ice
author: Erin Hunter
description: Fireheart has earned his warrior name, but the forest is far from peaceful as tensions between the four Clans threaten to erupt into open war. When WindClan is driven from their territory by the ruthless ShadowClan, Fireheart and his companion Graystripe are sent on a dangerous mission to bring them home. Meanwhile, Graystripe's forbidden friendship with a RiverClan cat puts both their loyalties to the test. This gripping sequel deepens the world of the warrior cats with new alliances, betrayals, and a chilling prophecy that fire alone can save the Clan.

title: Forest of Secrets
author: Erin Hunter
description: Fireheart is determined to uncover the truth about the death of the former ThunderClan deputy Redtail, a secret that could shake the very foundations of his Clan. As he digs deeper, he discovers a web of treachery that leads to the most powerful cat in ThunderClan. Meanwhile, rising floodwaters and rival Clan tensions threaten the safety of every cat in the forest. This third Warriors book is a masterfully plotted tale of loyalty, deception, and the courage it takes to stand up for what is right.

title: Rising Storm
author: Erin Hunter
description: With the treacherous Tigerclaw banished from ThunderClan, Fireheart hopes for a season of peace, but new dangers soon emerge. A devastating fire sweeps through the forest, and Fireheart must lead his Clanmates to safety while dealing with challenges to his new role as deputy. Bluestar, the ThunderClan leader, is losing faith in StarClan and in her own warriors, leaving Fireheart to hold the Clan together. This fourth Warriors book delivers intense action and emotional depth as Fireheart faces his greatest test of leadership.

title: A Dangerous Path
author: Erin Hunter
description: A sinister new threat stalks the forest as a pack of savage dogs begins terrorizing the Clans, and ThunderClan is directly in their path. Fireheart must find a way to protect his Clan while dealing with Bluestar's increasingly erratic behavior and Tigerstar's scheming from ShadowClan. The tension builds to a heart-pounding climax as Fireheart devises a desperate plan to lead the dogs away from the camp. This fifth Warriors book is one of the most suspenseful and emotional entries in the series, with consequences that change everything.

title: The Darkest Hour
author: Erin Hunter
description:
Fire Alone Can Save Our Clan... 
ThunderClan's darkest hour is upon them, as Tigerstar's quest for power plunges the forest into terrible danger. In order to save the clans, Firestar must uncover the meaning of a very confusing prophecy from StarClan, "Four will become two. Lion and tiger will m...

title: Midnight
author: Erin Hunter
description:
Darkness, air, water, and sky will come together... and shake the forest to its roots. 

The wild cat Clans have lived in peace and harmony for many moons - but now, strange messages from their warrior ancestors speak of terrifying new prophecies and a mysterious danger. 

All the signs point...

title: Moonrise
author: Erin Hunter
description:
Darkness, air, water, and sky will come together. . . and shake the forest to its roots. 

Moons have passed since six cats set out from the forest on a journey to save their Clans. Now they are traveling home again, but on their way through the mountains, they meet a tribe of wild cats with a ...

title: Dawn
author: Erin Hunter
description:
Darkness, Air, Water and Sky will come together...and shake the forest to its roots. 

Something terrible is happening in the world of the Clans. Amid the destruction of the forest, cats are disappearing, including ThunderClan's beloved medicine cat apprentice, Leafpaw. Now the young cats who s...

title: Starlight
author: Erin Hunter
description: The four Clans have finally reached their new home by the lake after their harrowing Great Journey, but establishing new territories proves far from easy. Rivalries flare as each Clan stakes its claim, and the cats must learn to navigate unfamiliar terrain filled with unknown dangers. Leafpool receives troubling signs from StarClan that suggest not all the Clans will survive in their new home. This thrilling first full book set by the lake marks an exciting new chapter for the warrior cats as they build a fresh start.

title: Twilight
author: Erin Hunter
description:
Before there is peace, blood will spill blood...



As divisions between the Clans grow, Firestar's daughters are faced with difficult decisions. Leafpool is struggling between her medicine cat duties and her forbidden love. Squirrelflight has a choice- trust that her love would never betray ...

title: Sunset
author: Erin Hunter
description: The warrior Clans are settling into their new territories, but a dark shadow hangs over them as a long-hidden traitor prepares to strike. Brambleclaw is torn between his loyalty to ThunderClan and the mysterious dreams that draw him toward a dangerous path. Meanwhile, Leafpool struggles with a secret that could destroy her standing in the Clan forever. This explosive conclusion to The New Prophecy arc delivers shocking twists and unforgettable moments that will reshape the warrior Clans for generations to come.

title: Squirrelflight's Hope
author: Erin Hunter
description: Squirrelflight has always been a loyal ThunderClan warrior, but when she discovers a group of cats living on unclaimed land near the Clans, she faces an impossible choice. The other Clans see these strangers as a threat and demand they be driven away, but Squirrelflight believes they deserve a home. As tensions rise between the Clans and her own mate Bramblestar disagrees with her decisions, Squirrelflight must decide how far she will go to do what she believes is right. This Super Edition explores the beloved character's courage, compassion, and the sacrifices she makes for those she cares about.

title: Fablehaven
author: Brandon Mull
description: When siblings Kendra and Seth are sent to stay at their grandparents' mysterious estate, they discover that Fablehaven is actually a secret preserve for magical creatures. Enchanted gardens teem with fairies, and the surrounding forest hides far more dangerous beings bound by ancient treaties. But when Seth's curiosity leads him to break the rules of the preserve, a chain of events is set in motion that threatens to unleash the darkest creatures upon the world. This enchanting first book in the Fablehaven series blends wonder, danger, and adventure in a story that will captivate readers of all ages.

title: Rise of the Evening Star
author: Brandon Mull
description: Kendra and Seth return to Fablehaven only to discover that the magical preserve faces a terrifying new threat from the Society of the Evening Star. This shadowy organization is determined to infiltrate the preserve and steal a powerful hidden artifact that could tip the balance between good and evil. As new allies arrive to help protect Fablehaven, the siblings must use all their courage and newfound abilities to defend their magical home. This thrilling sequel raises the stakes dramatically and expands the world of Fablehaven with new creatures, mysteries, and dangers at every turn.

title: Grip of the Shadow Plague
author: Brandon Mull
description: A mysterious plague is sweeping through Fablehaven, transforming creatures of light into beings of darkness and throwing the preserve into chaos. Kendra and Seth must race to find the source of the plague before it corrupts everything they hold dear, including the friends and allies they depend on most. Their quest takes them deep into uncharted areas of the preserve where ancient and terrible secrets lie buried. This third Fablehaven book is the darkest and most suspenseful yet, with twists that will keep readers guessing until the very last page.

title: Secrets of the Dragon Sanctuary
author: Brandon Mull
description: Brace yourself for a shocking secret in the fourth novel of The New York Times' bestselling Fablehaven series. Two hidden artifacts have been found. Three more remain unrecovered. More preserves face destruction as the Society of the Evening Star relentlessly pursues new talismans. Reading in Pat...

title: Keys to the Demon Prison
author: Brandon Mull
description: The demon prison Zzyzx has kept the most dangerous creatures in existence locked away for millennia, but now the keys to open it are falling into the wrong hands. Kendra and Seth must embark on their most desperate mission yet to prevent the Society of the Evening Star from unleashing an apocalypse of demons upon the world. With allies falling and enemies closing in from every direction, the fate of all magical preserves hangs in the balance. This spectacular conclusion to the Fablehaven series delivers an epic battle between good and evil that brings every storyline to a satisfying and thrilling end.

title: Sky Raiders
author: Brandon Mull
description: When Cole Randolph and his friends are kidnapped on Halloween night and taken to a magical world called the Outskirts, Cole must find the courage to rescue them. He is sold into slavery and forced to join the Sky Raiders, a group of salvagers who explore mysterious floating castles that appear in the sky. Each castle is filled with dangerous creatures and enchanted objects that make every expedition a life-or-death adventure. This exciting first book in the Five Kingdoms series launches an unforgettable journey through a world of wonder, magic, and peril.

title: Rogue Knight
author: Brandon Mull
description: Cole Randolph continues his quest to rescue his kidnapped friends in the Outskirts, traveling to the kingdom of Elloweer where magic takes the form of illusions and enchantments. A mysterious figure known as the Rogue Knight is terrorizing the kingdom, defeating every champion who challenges him. Cole must uncover the Rogue Knight's true identity while searching for one of the lost princesses whose stolen power could help save the Outskirts. This action-packed sequel expands the world of the Five Kingdoms with new magic systems, colorful characters, and thrilling showdowns.

title: Crystal Keepers
author: Brandon Mull
description: Cole Randolph's journey through the Outskirts continues in the kingdom of Zeropolis, where magic is powered by advanced technology and the lines between science and sorcery blur. He must find the lost princess Honor while evading the forces of the evil High King and navigating a city full of technological wonders and hidden dangers. Along the way, Cole discovers new allies and faces enemies who can manipulate the very fabric of reality. This third Five Kingdoms adventure delivers a unique blend of fantasy and science fiction that keeps the excitement building.

title: Death Weavers
author: Brandon Mull
description:
Cole is about to face his biggest peril yet.

Since arriving in the Outskirts, Cole and his friends have fought monsters, challenged knights, and battled rampaging robots. But none of that has prepared them for Necronum.

In this haunting kingdom, it’s hard to tell the living from the dead, a...

title: Time Jumpers
author: Brandon Mull
description: In the final Five Kingdoms adventure, Cole Randolph enters the kingdom of Creon where magic controls time itself, allowing people to move between past, present, and future. Cole must find the last lost princess and confront the High King in a climactic battle that will determine the fate of the entire Outskirts. With his friends by his side and armed with everything he has learned on his incredible journey, Cole faces his greatest and most dangerous challenge yet. This epic conclusion to the series brings together all the threads of Cole's adventure in a satisfying and thrilling finale.

title: Dragonwatch
author: Brandon Mull
description: In the eagerly awaited sequel series to Fablehaven, the dragons who have been kept at the dragon sanctuaries no longer consider themselves prisoners and are preparing to wage war against humanity. Kendra and Seth are recruited as the new caretakers of the dragon sanctuary Wyrmroost, but they quickly discover that the powerful dragon king Celebrant has no intention of remaining contained. The siblings must use all their skills and magical abilities to prevent the dragons from breaking free and devastating the world. This thrilling new chapter raises the stakes higher than ever as the age of dragons threatens to return.

title: Wrath of the Dragon King
author: Brandon Mull
description: War has erupted at Wyrmroost as the dragon king Celebrant launches a devastating assault on the sanctuary's defenses, and Kendra and Seth are caught in the middle. With their allies scattered and the magical barriers crumbling, the siblings must find powerful new weapons and forge impossible alliances to survive. Seth embarks on a dangerous solo mission that could turn the tide of battle, while Kendra discovers that not all dragons are their enemies. This second Dragonwatch book delivers epic battle scenes and heartbreaking twists as the dragon war escalates beyond anyone's worst fears.

title: Master of the Phantom Isle
author: Brandon Mull
description:
Cursed by the Key of Forgetting, Seth has lost all memory of his past—his relationships, his experiences, and who he really is. For now he will align with his new mentor, Ronodin, the dark unicorn, who takes him to the Phantom Isle, the secret gateway to the Under Realm. Though Seth is not formally a prisoner, Ronodin wants to use him and his shadow charmer powers for his own dark ends.

Kendra is frantic to find her missing brother, but the quest will take her and her companions, including...

title: Champion of the Titan Games
author: Brandon Mull
description: With the war against the dragons intensifying, Kendra and Seth seek help from the Giant Queen in a desperate bid to find allies powerful enough to turn the tide. Seth must compete in the deadly Titan Games, an ancient gladiatorial contest where the stakes are nothing less than his life and freedom. Meanwhile, Kendra faces her own perilous challenges as dark forces work to undermine the last remaining dragon sanctuaries. This fourth Dragonwatch book pushes the siblings to their absolute limits with nonstop action and startling revelations about the true nature of the conflict.

title: Return of the Dragon Slayers
author: Brandon Mull
description: The magical world teeters on the brink of collapse as the dragon king Celebrant unites the dragons into a devastating army bent on conquering everything. Kendra and Seth must rally the legendary Dragon Slayers, ancient warriors who may be the only ones powerful enough to stop the onslaught. With old friends and new allies joining the fight, the final battle for the fate of all the magical preserves begins. This spectacular conclusion to the Dragonwatch series brings the epic saga that began with Fablehaven to a breathtaking and satisfying end.

title: Eragon
author: Christopher Paolini
description: When fifteen-year-old Eragon discovers a mysterious blue stone in the mountains, he never imagines it will hatch into a dragon and change his life forever. Bonded to the dragon Saphira, Eragon becomes the first new Dragon Rider in over a century, thrust into an ancient conflict against the tyrannical king Galbatorix. With the guidance of an old storyteller named Brom, Eragon begins his training and sets out on a quest for vengeance and justice. This sweeping fantasy epic launched the Inheritance Cycle and captivated millions of readers with its richly imagined world of dragons, magic, and adventure.

title: Eldest
author: Christopher Paolini
description: After the battle at Farthen Dur, Eragon and his dragon Saphira travel to the elven city of Ellesmera to continue their training as Dragon Rider and dragon. Under the guidance of the ancient elf Oromis and his dragon Glaedr, Eragon must master the skills of magic, swordsmanship, and the ancient language before he can face King Galbatorix. Meanwhile, Eragon's cousin Roran leads the people of Carvahall on a desperate journey to escape the Empire's wrath. This epic sequel expands the world of Alagaesia and builds toward a confrontation that will shake the foundations of the Empire.

title: Brisingr
author: Christopher Paolini
description: OATHS SWORN . . . loyalties tested . . . forces collide.Following the colossal battle against the Empire's warriors on the Burning Plains, Eragon and his dragon, Saphira, have narrowly escaped with their lives. Still there is more at hand for the Rider and his dragon, as Eragon finds himself boun...

title: Inheritance
author: Christopher Paolini
description: The epic conclusion to the Inheritance Cycle finds Eragon and his dragon Saphira facing their greatest challenge yet as they lead the Varden in a final assault against the tyrannical King Galbatorix. With allies old and new, Eragon must find a way to defeat a king who has accumulated centuries of dark power. The fate of Alagaesia hangs in the balance as long-kept secrets are revealed and sacrifices must be made. This sweeping finale brings together all the threads of Eragon's journey from farm boy to Dragon Rider in a stunning conclusion.

title: Skulduggery Pleasant
author: Derek Landy
description: Meet the great Skulduggery Pleasant: wise-cracking detective, powerful magician, master of dirty tricks and burglary (in the name of the greater good, of course). Oh yeah. And dead. Then there's his sidekick, Stephanie. She's...well, she's a twelve-year-old girl. With a pair like this on the case...

title: Playing with Fire
author: Derek Landy
description: Just when you think you've saved the world...You will kill her? the Torment asked. Skulduggery sagged. "Yes." He hesitated, then took his gun from his jacket. "I'm sorry, Valkyrie," he said softly. "Don't talk to me," Valkyrie said. "Just do what you have to do." Valkyrie parted her tunic, and Sk...

title: The Faceless Ones
author: Derek Landy
description: The third bone-breaking, belly-busting adventure in the series that puts the "funny" back in...um...funny series. That didn't really work, did it?If you've read the previous Skulduggery books then you know what the Faceless Ones are – and if you know what the Faceless Ones are, then you can proba...

title: Dark Days
author: Derek Landy
description: In the fourth Skulduggery Pleasant novel, Skulduggery has been trapped in the dimension of the Faceless Ones, and Valkyrie Cain is determined to bring him back no matter the cost. With the help of some dubious allies and a very dangerous plan, Valkyrie embarks on a mission to open a portal between dimensions and rescue her skeleton partner. But Skulduggery's time among the Faceless Ones has changed him, and the world has not stood still in his absence. Old enemies are making new moves, and Valkyrie must face increasingly difficult choices as the darkness closes in around her.

title: Mortal Coil
author: Derek Landy
description: In the fifth installment of the Skulduggery Pleasant series, the skeleton detective and his partner Valkyrie Cain face their most personal threat yet. The Remnants, dark spirits that possess anyone they touch, have been unleashed upon the world, and Valkyrie discovers that a terrifying prophecy about her future may be coming true. As the body count rises and old enemies resurface, Valkyrie must confront the darkness growing inside her while Skulduggery fights to protect those he cares about. Packed with Derek Landy's signature wit and nonstop action, Mortal Coil raises the stakes higher than ever before.

title: Death Bringer
author: Derek Landy
description: The Necromancers have found their Death Bringer, and it is not Valkyrie Cain, which should be good news except their chosen one plans to dissolve the barrier between life and death entirely. Skulduggery Pleasant and Valkyrie must stop the Death Bringer before they can complete a ritual that would kill half the world's population in order to grant the other half immortality. Old enemies and new threats converge as the skeleton detective faces one of his most morally complex cases yet. This seventh Skulduggery Pleasant book is a darkly funny and action-packed adventure that continues to raise the stakes of the series.

title: Kingdom of the Wicked
author: Derek Landy
description: Across the land, normal people are suddenly developing wild and unstable magical powers, endangering themselves and everyone around them. Skulduggery Pleasant and Valkyrie Cain must investigate the source of this magical outbreak while dealing with the fallout of their previous adventures. But an even greater threat lurks in the shadows, one that could reshape the entire world of sorcery. As Valkyrie struggles with her own growing darkness, the skeleton detective and his partner face impossible choices in this gripping seventh installment of the series.

title: Last Stand of Dead Men
author: Derek Landy
description: The war between the Sanctuaries has finally erupted, and the magical world is tearing itself apart. Skulduggery Pleasant and Valkyrie Cain find themselves caught in the middle of a devastating conflict as sorcerers choose sides and old alliances crumble. With armies clashing and dark powers rising, our heroes must fight on multiple fronts to prevent total annihilation. Meanwhile, a sinister plan is unfolding that could make all of their efforts meaningless, pushing Valkyrie closer than ever to a fate she desperately wants to avoid.

title: The Dying of the Light
author: Derek Landy
description: Valkerie. Darquesse. Stephanie. The world ain't big enough for the three of them. The end will come...The War of the Sanctuaries has been won, but it was not without its casualties. Following the loss of Valkyrie Cain, Skulduggery Pleasant must use any and all means to track down and stop Darques...

title: Skulduggery Pleasant Essential Handbook
author: Derek Landy
description: This essential handbook is the ultimate companion guide for fans of the Skulduggery Pleasant series. Packed with character profiles, magical lore, and behind-the-scenes details, it covers everything from Skulduggery's witty one-liners to the dark secrets of the magical world. Readers will find detailed information about the Sanctuaries, the various types of magic, and the colorful cast of heroes and villains that populate Derek Landy's beloved series. Whether you are a longtime fan or new to the series, this guide is the perfect reference for exploring the world of the skeleton detective.

title: The Golden Compass
author: Philip Pullman
description: In a world where every person's soul takes the form of an animal companion called a daemon, young Lyra Belacqua lives a carefree life among the scholars of Jordan College, Oxford. When her best friend Roger and other children begin disappearing, Lyra sets out on a perilous journey to the frozen North to rescue them, armed with a mysterious truth-telling device called an alethiometer. Along the way, she encounters armored polar bears, witch clans, and a sinister organization conducting horrifying experiments on children. This magnificent first book in the His Dark Materials trilogy is a masterpiece of imaginative storytelling that has enchanted readers for generations.

title: The Subtle Knife
author: Philip Pullman
description:
As the boundaries between worlds begin to dissolve, Lyra and her daemon help Will Parry in his search for his father and for a powerful, magical knife.

She had asked: What is he? A friend or an enemy?

The alethiometer answered: He is a murderer.

When she saw the answer, she relaxed at on...

title: The Amber Spyglass
author: Philip Pullman
description: In the astonishing finale to the His Dark Materials trilogy, Lyra and Will are in unspeakable danger. With help from Iorek Byrnison the armored bear and two tiny Gallivespian spies, they must journey to a dank and gray-lit world where no living soul has ever gone. All the while, Dr. Mary Malone b...

title: Nicholas St. North and the Battle of the Nightmare King
author: William Joyce
description: Before he was Santa Claus, Nicholas St. North was a daring young swordsman and adventurer who wandered the world seeking treasure and excitement. When the evil Nightmare King Pitch threatens to plunge the world into eternal darkness and fear, North joins forces with a mysterious group of legendary figures to stop him. Armed with his twin scimitars and an indomitable spirit, North must discover that the greatest treasure of all is protecting the dreams and wonder of children everywhere. This beautifully illustrated chapter book is the enchanting first installment in the Guardians of Childhood series.

title: E. Aster Bunnymund and the Warrior Eggs
author: William Joyce
description:
Pitch, the Nightmare King, and his Fearlings had been soundly driven back by Nicholas St. North and company in the first Guardians’ adventure. But now Pitch has disappeared completely—and out of sight does NOT make for out of mind. It seems certain that he’s plotting a particularly nefarious revenge, and the Guardians suspect he might have gone underground. But how can they find him there?

Enter E. Aster Bunnymund, the only emissary of the fabled brotherhood of the Pookas—the league of phi...

title: Toothiana, Queen of the Tooth Fairy Armies
author: William Joyce
description: In the third book of the Guardians of Childhood series, the origin of the Tooth Fairy is finally revealed. A mysterious flying girl named Toothiana possesses an extraordinary secret: the teeth she collects hold the most precious childhood memories of every person on Earth. When Pitch the Nightmare King discovers this power, he sets out to steal the teeth and use those memories for his dark purposes. Toothiana must rally her army of tiny fairy helpers and join forces with the other Guardians to protect the children of the world and their most treasured memories.

title: The Sandman and the War of Dreams
author: William Joyce
description: The Guardians face their greatest crisis yet when Pitch the Nightmare King and the traitorous former Guardian Mother Nature launch an all-out war against the forces of good dreams. Sanderson Mansnoozie, the ancient and powerful Sandman, is called upon to lead the defense of children's dreams against an army of nightmares. Despite his quiet nature and love of sleep, the Sandman proves to be one of the most formidable Guardians of all. This fourth Guardians of Childhood book is an epic adventure filled with dazzling dream magic and the power of imagination.

title: Jack Frost
author: William Joyce
description: In the fifth and final book of the Guardians of Childhood series, the mysterious and mischievous Jack Frost takes center stage. Nightlight, who has been watching over the children of Earth since the very beginning, undergoes a remarkable transformation and becomes the legendary Jack Frost. But Pitch the Nightmare King is gathering his dark forces for one last terrible assault on the Guardians and the children they protect. Jack must discover who he truly is and embrace his destiny to help the Guardians win their greatest battle.

title: The Unwanteds
author: Lisa McMann
description: When Alex finds out he is Unwanted, he expects to die. That is the way of the people of Quill. Each year, all the thirteen-year-olds are labeled as Wanted, Necessary, or Unwanted. Wanteds get more schooling and train to join the Quillitary. Necessaries keep the farms running. Unwanteds are set fo...

title: Island of Silence
author: Lisa McMann
description: In the second book of the Unwanteds series, the magical world of Artime and the stark land of Quill are still adjusting to the upheaval caused by Alex Stowe's rebellion. Mr. Today begins training fourteen-year-old Alex as his successor to lead Artime, but Alex struggles with the weight of this enormous responsibility. Meanwhile, his twin brother Aaron, disgraced and bitter, plots from the shadows to seize control of Quill and destroy Artime once and for all. As tensions rise between the two worlds, a mysterious silent island holds secrets that could change everything.

title: Island of Fire
author: Lisa McMann
description: The magical world of Artime has been destroyed, and the Unwanteds are looking to Alex Stowe for answers. But Alex is overwhelmed by guilt and grief, unsure of how to restore the paradise they have lost. Meanwhile, his twin brother Aaron continues to build his army in Quill, preparing to conquer what remains. When a very dangerous common enemy is revealed, one that threatens both Artime and Quill alike, the twins may have no choice but to set aside their differences to survive.

title: Island of Legends
author: Lisa McMann
description: Alex Stowe leads an expedition to find and rescue his friends who were carried away on a volcanic glass island after the devastating events of the previous book. The journey takes them to the mysterious Island of Legends, home to extraordinary magical creatures and ancient secrets that could change everything for Artime. Along the way, Alex creates his most ambitious magical creature yet and discovers that some legends are more real than anyone imagined. This fourth Unwanteds book expands the magical world in exciting new directions while testing Alex's growing abilities as the mage of Artime.

title: Island of Shipwrecks
author: Lisa McMann
description: Alex and his friends from Artime are stranded on a newly discovered island after a catastrophic shipwreck, and they quickly realize they are not alone. Strange and dangerous creatures inhabit this mysterious land, and the group must find a way to survive while searching for a route home. Meanwhile, back in Quill, Aaron's power base continues to grow as he forges an unlikely alliance in a risky plan to finally conquer Artime once and for all. With the twins on opposite sides of the world and both facing mounting dangers, this fifth installment raises the stakes as the conflict between Artime and Quill reaches a boiling point.

title: Island of Graves
author: Lisa McMann
description: Aaron Stowe has lost everything he built in Quill and finds himself alone and desperate on a remote island, forced to confront who he truly is. Meanwhile, Alex and his friends face a new threat that endangers both the magical world of Artime and the stark land of Quill. The twin brothers' paths are on a collision course as buried secrets about their past come to light and an unlikely alliance begins to form. This sixth Unwanteds book delivers powerful character development and thrilling adventure as the series builds toward its epic conclusion.

title: Island of Dragons
author: Lisa McMann
description: In the thrilling conclusion to the Unwanteds series, twins Alex and Aaron Stowe must finally put aside their differences and unite to face the deadliest enemy that Quill and Artime have ever known. A massive threat from across the sea brings an army of dragons and warriors to their shores, and only by combining their very different strengths can the brothers hope to save their people. Along the way, long-buried secrets are revealed and sacrifices must be made that will change everything. This epic finale brings the beloved series to a satisfying close, proving that even the most unlikely family bonds can save the world.

title: Dragon Captives
author: Lisa McMann
description: In the first book of the Unwanteds Quests series, twins Fifer and Thisbe Stowe have grown up in the magical world of Artime, but they struggle to control their own extraordinary powers. When they learn that dragons in the faraway land of Grimere have been enslaved, the twins set off on a daring rescue mission against the wishes of their older brother Alex. Along the way, they face dangerous enemies and discover that their powers may be both a blessing and a curse. This exciting new chapter in the Unwanteds world launches a fresh adventure for a new generation of heroes.

title: Dragon Bones
author: Lisa McMann
description: In the second book of the Unwanteds Quests, twin Thisbe Stowe is trapped deep in the catacombs of the land of the dragons, forced to labor transporting the bones of ancient dragon rulers. As others extract the dormant magical properties from these bones for sinister purposes, Thisbe secretly works to master her own fiery and unpredictable powers. Meanwhile, her friends and family in Artime mount a desperate rescue mission, facing new dangers across unknown seas. Thisbe must find the courage to control her magic and engineer her own escape before she loses herself to the darkness that surrounds her.

title: Dragon Ghosts
author: Lisa McMann
description: In the third book of the Unwanteds Quests, the stakes have never been higher for the people of Artime. After a devastating loss, Fifer and her friends must pick up the pieces and find a way to rescue Thisbe from the clutches of the Revinir in the land of the dragons. As dark forces grow stronger and new enemies emerge, the young heroes must rely on their creativity and courage to survive. Meanwhile, shocking revelations about the dragon-human connection threaten to upend everything the Unwanteds thought they knew about their world.

title: Artemis Fowl
author: Eoin Colfer
description: Twelve-year-old Artemis Fowl is a criminal mastermind and the most dangerous boy genius the world has ever seen. When Artemis discovers the existence of an underground fairy civilization, he hatches a brilliant plan to kidnap a fairy and hold her for ransom to restore his family's fortune. But Captain Holly Short of the LEPrecon fairy police force is no easy target, and the fairy world retaliates with its full arsenal of magic and technology. This wickedly clever adventure pits one boy's genius against an entire civilization in a high-stakes game of wits that is equal parts thrilling and hilarious.

title: The Arctic Incident
author: Eoin Colfer
description: Artemis Fowl receives a shocking message: his father, who has been missing for two years, may still be alive and held captive by the Russian Mafiya in the frozen wasteland of northern Russia. Meanwhile, the fairy world faces its own crisis as a goblin rebellion threatens Haven City from below. The fairy police suspect Artemis is behind the uprising, but when the truth emerges, an unlikely alliance is formed. Artemis and Captain Holly Short must join forces, combining human cunning and fairy magic, to rescue Artemis's father and save the fairy civilization from destruction.

title: The Eternity Code
author: Eoin Colfer
description: Artemis Fowl has constructed a supercomputer using stolen fairy technology, but when he demonstrates it to a ruthless American businessman named Jon Spiro, things go horribly wrong. Spiro steals the device, and Artemis's loyal bodyguard Butler is gravely injured in the confrontation. Now Artemis must team up with his former enemies in the fairy world, including Captain Holly Short and the kleptomaniac dwarf Mulch Diggums, to pull off the most daring heist of his criminal career. The clock is ticking, because if Spiro unlocks the computer's secrets, the fairy world will be exposed to humanity forever.

title: The Opal Deception
author: Eoin Colfer
description: The power-hungry pixie Opal Koboi has escaped from prison and is more dangerous than ever, with a diabolical plan to destroy the fairy civilization and rule the world. Her first step is eliminating everyone who put her behind bars, which means Artemis Fowl and Captain Holly Short are at the top of her hit list. When Opal's scheme erases Artemis's memories of the fairy world, Holly must find a way to restore them before it is too late. This fourth Artemis Fowl book is a high-stakes thriller packed with ingenious plot twists and the series' trademark blend of technology and magic.

title: The Lost Colony
author: Eoin Colfer
description: Artemis Fowl discovers that a lost colony of demons is about to reappear on Earth after being trapped in a time warp for thousands of years, and he is not the only one who knows about it. A shadowy organization is racing to exploit the demons' return, and Artemis must ally with Holly Short and a young demon named Number One to prevent catastrophe. The mission requires Artemis to use every ounce of his genius in a battle that spans time and dimensions. This fifth Artemis Fowl adventure introduces fascinating new characters and takes the series in bold new directions.

title: The Time Paradox
author: Eoin Colfer
description: When Artemis Fowl's mother contracts the deadly fairy disease Spelltropy, the only cure requires the brain fluid of a lemur that Artemis himself drove to extinction years ago. Desperate to save his mother, Artemis convinces Holly Short to help him travel back in time to steal the lemur from his own younger self. But altering the past creates dangerous ripples through time, and Artemis must outwit his own ten-year-old criminal genius mind to succeed. This sixth Artemis Fowl book is a mind-bending adventure that forces Artemis to confront the consequences of his past actions.

title: The Atlantis Complex
author: Eoin Colfer
description:
Artemis has committed his entire fortune to a project he believes will save the planet and its inhabitants, both human and fairy. Can it be true? Has goodness taken hold of the world's greatest teenage criminal mastermind? 

Captain Holly Short is unconvinced, and discovers that Artemis is suff...

title: The Last Guardian
author: Eoin Colfer
description: In the thrilling final chapter of the Artemis Fowl series, the power-mad pixie Opal Koboi has devised her most devastating plan yet. By opening the Berserker Gate, she unleashes an army of ancient fairy spirits who will obey her every command and destroy humanity once and for all. Artemis Fowl and Captain Holly Short must rally every ally they have for one last desperate stand to save both the human and fairy worlds. With everything on the line, Artemis faces the ultimate test of his genius and his newfound conscience in this explosive conclusion to the beloved series.

title: Spy School
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: Ben Ripley is not exactly the best spy candidate, but when he is recruited to the CIA's Academy of Espionage as a middle schooler, he jumps at the chance to leave his boring life behind. Almost immediately, Ben discovers that the academy is under threat from the evil organization SPYDER, and he may have been enrolled just to serve as bait. With the help of feisty fellow student Erica Hale, Ben must navigate the dangerous world of espionage, outsmart enemy agents, and save the school from destruction. This hilarious and action-packed adventure proves that even the most unlikely hero can save the day.

title: Spy Camp
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: Ben Ripley is looking forward to a relaxing summer at spy camp, far from the dangers of the CIA's Academy of Espionage. But when he receives a terrifying death threat from the evil organization SPYDER, his vacation plans are ruined before they even begin. Stuck at a wilderness camp with his friends and a few unexpected enemies, Ben must uncover SPYDER's latest plot while dodging assassins and surviving the great outdoors. With the help of the brilliant Erica Hale and some seriously questionable camping skills, Ben is in for his most action-packed summer ever.

title: Evil Spy School
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: When Ben Ripley is kicked out of the CIA's spy school, he is approached by the evil organization SPYDER with an offer to join their ranks. The CIA sees a golden opportunity and sends Ben undercover to infiltrate the enemy from within. But playing double agent is far more dangerous than anything Ben has faced before, and he quickly realizes SPYDER's latest scheme could have devastating consequences. With no backup and enemies on every side, Ben must rely on his wits and his friends to take down SPYDER from the inside.

title: Spy Ski School
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: Thirteen-year-old spy-in-training Ben Ripley is sent to the ski slopes of Vail, Colorado, on a top-priority mission disguised as a winter vacation. His assignment is to befriend Jessica Shang, the teen daughter of a notorious criminal mastermind, and uncover her father's sinister plot. But between dodging avalanches, navigating double agents, and trying to actually learn how to ski, Ben quickly realizes this mission is far more dangerous than he bargained for. With enemies lurking on every slope and the clock ticking down, Ben must rely on his wits and his friends to save the day once again.

title: Spy School Secret Service
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: When a threat against the President of the United States is uncovered, thirteen-year-old Ben Ripley is pulled out of spy school and assigned to help with protection detail at the White House. It should be a straightforward mission, but nothing is ever simple when SPYDER is involved. As Ben navigates the high-security world of the Secret Service, he realizes the assassination plot is more complex and dangerous than anyone anticipated. With enemies hiding in plain sight and the fate of the nation hanging in the balance, Ben must use every trick he has learned to prevent disaster.

title: Belly Up
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: Twelve-year-old Teddy Fitzroy lives at FunJungle, an enormous state-of-the-art zoo and theme park, because his mother is the park's head primatologist. When Henry the Hippo, the zoo's most beloved and valuable resident, is found dead, the official verdict is natural causes. But Teddy suspects foul play, and with the help of a feisty girl named Summer McCracken, he launches his own investigation into what really happened. This funny and fast-paced mystery is full of twists, zoo facts, and the kind of trouble only a kid living in a zoo could find.

title: Poached
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: When the world's most beloved koala goes missing from FunJungle, Teddy Fitzroy is the prime suspect thanks to an unfortunate viral video that makes him look guilty. Determined to clear his name, Teddy launches his own investigation and discovers that the koala theft is connected to a much larger and more dangerous criminal operation. With the help of his friends Summer and Xavier, Teddy must navigate a web of suspects and red herrings to find the real culprit. This second FunJungle mystery is a wildly entertaining whodunit that combines humor, animal facts, and clever detective work.

title: Big Game
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: Someone has shot FunJungle's pregnant and endangered Asian greater one-horned rhinoceros with a tranquilizer dart, and Teddy Fitzroy is determined to find out who is behind the attack. As Teddy investigates, he discovers a shadowy network of illegal wildlife traders who will stop at nothing to get what they want. The mystery leads him deep into the world of animal trafficking, and this time the danger is more real than ever before. This third FunJungle adventure tackles the serious issue of wildlife poaching while delivering all the humor and excitement fans have come to expect.

title: Panda-monium
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: When FunJungle's newest and most famous attraction, a pair of giant pandas on loan from China, vanishes without a trace, Teddy Fitzroy is once again on the case. The disappearance of the pandas threatens to create an international incident, and the park's owner J.J. McCracken is desperate for answers. Teddy and his friend Summer dive into the investigation, uncovering a web of suspects that includes shady animal dealers, rival zoos, and some very suspicious staff members. With the whole world watching and the pressure mounting, Teddy must crack the case before it is too late.

title: Lion Down
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: When a mountain lion shows up in the parking lot of FunJungle, it sets off a fierce debate between those who want to protect the big cat and those who want it removed permanently. Teddy Fitzroy gets caught in the middle of the controversy while also dealing with a string of mysterious crimes inside the zoo. As tensions escalate and threats are made against both animals and people, Teddy must solve the case before someone gets seriously hurt. This fifth FunJungle mystery is a thrilling and thought-provoking adventure about conservation, community, and standing up for what is right.

title: Charlie Thorne and the Last Equation
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: Charlie Thorne is twelve years old, a genius, and a bit of a troublemaker. When the CIA discovers that Albert Einstein wrote a secret equation with the power to either destroy the world or save it, they recruit Charlie to help track it down before it falls into the wrong hands. Teamed with a young CIA agent and chased by dangerous enemies across multiple countries, Charlie must use her extraordinary intellect to decipher Einstein's clues. This globe-trotting thriller is packed with puzzles, action, and a heroine who is always the smartest person in the room.

title: The Last Musketeer
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: Greg Rich is an ordinary modern-day kid until a class trip to a museum goes horribly wrong and he is transported back in time to 17th-century France. Stranded in a dangerous era of swordfights and political intrigue, Greg encounters the legendary Musketeers: Athos, Porthos, Aramis, and the young D'Artagnan. Together they must thwart a diabolical plot by the villainous Michel Dinicour that threatens to change the course of history. This swashbuckling adventure blends time travel, action, and humor in a story that brings classic adventure to life for young readers.

title: The Fourth Stall
author: Chris Rylander
description: Mac Barrett is a fifth-grade fixer who runs a secret problem-solving business out of the fourth stall of the boys' bathroom at his school. Along with his best friend and business partner Vince, Mac helps kids with everything from bullies to bad grades, all for a small fee. But when a dangerous teenage bully named Staples starts running a gambling ring that threatens Mac's classmates, Mac takes on his biggest and most dangerous case yet. This clever and funny middle-grade novel reads like a kid-friendly crime thriller, complete with double-crosses, clever schemes, and a whole lot of heart.

title: The Fourth Stall Part II
author: Chris Rylander
description: Mac and Vince are back in business, running their problem-solving operation out of the fourth stall of the boys' bathroom. But this time, a mysterious new threat is targeting their operation, and someone is trying to take over their territory. As Mac investigates, he uncovers a conspiracy that goes deeper than any schoolyard prank, putting everything he has built at risk. With loyalties tested and enemies closing in, Mac must use all of his cunning to protect his friends and his business in this thrilling sequel.

title: The Fourth Stall Part III
author: Chris Rylander
description: In the final installment of the Fourth Stall trilogy, Mac Barrett faces the biggest threat to his underground business empire yet. A powerful new adversary has emerged, one with connections that reach far beyond the schoolyard, and Mac and Vince must fight to save everything they have worked for. As alliances shift and old friends become uncertain allies, Mac discovers that being the school's fixer comes with a heavy price. This action-packed conclusion delivers plenty of twists, laughs, and heart as Mac learns what it truly means to stand up for what matters.

title: Codename Zero
author: Chris Rylander
description: Carson Maddox is just an average kid until he discovers that his school is a front for a secret government agency, and he has been unknowingly training to be a spy his entire life. When a dangerous threat emerges that could bring the agency to its knees, Carson is thrust into his first real mission. Armed with gadgets, disguises, and a team of fellow kid operatives, he must navigate a world of espionage far more dangerous than anything he imagined. This action-packed adventure is perfect for readers who love spy stories with humor, twists, and a reluctant hero who rises to the occasion.

series_author_group: Shannon Messenger — Keeper of the Lost Cities
title: Keeper of the Lost Cities
author: Shannon Messenger
description: Twelve-year-old Sophie has never quite fit into her life. She’s skipped multiple grades and doesn’t really connect with the older kids at school, but she’s not comfortable with her family, either. The reason? Sophie’s a Telepath, someone who can read minds. No one knows her secret—at least, that’...

series_author_group: Shannon Messenger — Keeper of the Lost Cities
title: Exile
author: Shannon Messenger
description: Sophie Foster is settling into her new life in the Lost Cities, but a terrifying encounter with a mysterious organization called the Neverseen shatters her sense of safety. When she discovers that her powerful telepathic abilities are linked to a conspiracy that threatens the elvin world, Sophie must dig deeper into her mysterious past. With the help of her friends and a rebellious group called the Black Swan, she begins to uncover secrets that the elvin Council would prefer to keep hidden. This second Keeper of the Lost Cities book deepens the mystery and raises the stakes for Sophie and everyone she cares about.

series_author_group: Shannon Messenger — Keeper of the Lost Cities
title: Everblaze
author: Shannon Messenger
description: Sophie Foster is determined to fight back against the Neverseen after everything they have taken from her, and her abilities are growing stronger with each passing day. When a devastating act of destruction threatens to expose the elvin world to humans, Sophie must work with the Black Swan to track down those responsible. But the deeper she digs, the more she realizes that the enemy is far more powerful and connected than anyone imagined. This third Keeper of the Lost Cities book is packed with shocking revelations, new abilities, and the kind of twists that will leave readers breathless.

series_author_group: Shannon Messenger — Keeper of the Lost Cities
title: Neverseen
author: Shannon Messenger
description:
Sophie Foster is on the run—but at least she’s not alone.

Her closest friends from the Lost Cities have gone with her to join the Black Swan. They still have doubts about the shadowy organization, but the only way to find answers is to start working with them. And as they settle into their new...

series_author_group: Shannon Messenger — Keeper of the Lost Cities
title: Flashback
author: Shannon Messenger
description: In the seventh book of the Keeper of the Lost Cities series, Sophie Foster is recovering from a brutal attack that has left her shaken and struggling with echoes from her past. As she and her friends work to heal and regroup, they must also confront new threats from the Neverseen, who are growing bolder with each passing day. Sophie's investigation into her own mysterious origins takes a startling turn, revealing connections she never expected. With alliances shifting and danger escalating, Sophie must dig deeper than ever to protect those she loves and uncover the truth about her own identity.

title: The Colossus Rises
author: Peter Lerangis
description: When thirteen-year-old Jack McKinley collapses and nearly dies, he wakes up to discover he carries a rare genetic marker called G7W that gives him extraordinary abilities but will also kill him by age fourteen. Jack learns that three other teens, Marco, Aly, and Cass, share the same condition, and their only hope of survival lies in finding the seven Loculi, magical orbs hidden in the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. Their quest begins at the ruins of the Colossus of Rhodes, where they must brave deadly traps and powerful guardians to recover the first Loculus. This thrilling adventure blends ancient mysteries with modern-day action in a race against time to cheat death itself.

title: Lost in Babylon
author: Peter Lerangis
description: Jack McKinley and his companions travel to the ancient city of Babylon in search of the second Loculus, a magical orb that could save their lives and unlock extraordinary powers. But the city holds deadly secrets, and the group must navigate treacherous puzzles and face an unexpected betrayal from within their own ranks. As time runs out on their quest, Jack discovers that the ancient wonders hold powers far greater and more dangerous than he ever imagined. This thrilling second Seven Wonders book takes readers on an unforgettable adventure through one of history's most legendary cities.

title: The Tomb of Shadows
author: Peter Lerangis
description: After a devastating betrayal, Jack McKinley and his remaining friends must venture into the mysterious Tomb of Shadows to retrieve the third Loculus. The tomb is a place of darkness and illusion where the dead can reach out to the living, and each member of the team must confront their deepest fears. As the secrets of the ancient Atlanteans are gradually revealed, Jack begins to question everything he thought he knew about their mission. This haunting third Seven Wonders book pushes the heroes to their emotional limits while uncovering the true nature of the Loculi's power.

title: The Curse of the King
author: Peter Lerangis
description: Jack McKinley and his friends face their greatest challenge yet as they search for the fourth Loculus in the long-lost Statue of Zeus at Olympia. The ancient king Massarym's curse threatens to destroy them all, and a powerful enemy from the past resurfaces with devastating consequences. Jack must use all of his growing abilities and the strength of his friendships to survive. This fourth Seven Wonders book ramps up the action and drama as the quest for the Loculi races toward its climactic conclusion.

title: The Legend of the Rift
author: Peter Lerangis
description: In the epic conclusion to the Seven Wonders series, Jack McKinley and his friends face their most impossible challenge yet. With four of the seven Loculi recovered, the race to find the remaining three becomes a desperate struggle against time and powerful enemies. The Massa, the Karai Institute, and ancient forces all converge in a final battle that will determine the fate of Atlantis and the world. Jack must push his G7W powers to their limits and make the ultimate sacrifice to save his friends and prevent catastrophe.

title: On the Edge of the Dark Sea of Darkness
author: Andrew Peterson
description: In the land of Aerwiar, the three Igiby children live a quiet life with their mother and grandfather in a cottage above the cliffs on the Dark Sea of Darkness. But the evil Fangs of Dang, lizard-like soldiers who serve the mysterious Gnag the Nameless, occupy their homeland of Skree and make life dangerous for everyone. When the children discover that their family holds a secret that the Fangs would do anything to uncover, their peaceful life is shattered forever. This delightfully inventive first book in the Wingfeather Saga is a charming blend of humor, heart, and high adventure.

title: North or Be Eaten
author: Andrew Peterson
description: Janner, Tink, and Leeli Igiby have learned the truth about their royal heritage as the heirs to the lost kingdom of Anniera, and now they must flee the Fangs of Dang who are hunting them relentlessly. Their perilous journey takes them north toward the Ice Prairies, through dangerous forests and past fearsome creatures that test their courage at every turn. Along the way, the bonds between the siblings are tested as each child discovers their own unique gifts and responsibilities. This second Wingfeather Saga book deepens the world-building and raises the stakes in a story that is equal parts thrilling and heartwarming.

title: The Monster in the Hollows
author: Andrew Peterson
description:
Janner Wingfeather's father was the High King of Anniera. But his father is gone. The kingdom has fallen. The royal family is on the run, and the Fang armies of Gnag the Nameless are close behind.
Janner and his family hope to find refuge in the last safe place in the world: the Green Hollows--a...

title: The Warden and the Wolf King
author: Andrew Peterson
description: The final battle against Gnag the Nameless and his army of Fangs looms as the people of the Green Hollows prepare for war, and the Wingfeather children must play their part in the fight. Janner, Kalmar, and Leeli each face challenges that will define who they are and test the limits of their love for each other. Secrets about the nature of the Fangs and the true history of Anniera are revealed in stunning fashion as the story builds to its breathtaking climax. This magnificent conclusion to the Wingfeather Saga is an emotionally powerful and deeply satisfying ending to one of fantasy's most beloved family adventures.

title: The Stonekeeper
author: Kazu Kibuishi
description: After a family tragedy, Emily, Navin, and their mother move into the old house of their great-grandfather, only to discover it is filled with strange and wonderful things. When their mother is kidnapped by a terrifying creature and dragged through a mysterious door in the basement, Emily and Navin must follow her into a dangerous underground world called Alledia. Emily discovers an ancient amulet that grants her incredible power, but the stone has a will of its own and a dark history. This stunning first book in the Amulet graphic novel series launches an epic adventure filled with gorgeous artwork and unforgettable characters.

title: The Stonekeeper's Curse
author: Kazu Kibuishi
description:
Graphic novel star Kazu Kibuishi returns with his mysterious world full of new allies . . . and old enemies!
Emily and Navin's mother is still in a coma from the arachnopod's poison, and there's only one place to find help: Kanalis, the bustling, beautiful city of waterfalls. But when Em, her br...

title: The Cloud Searchers
author: Kazu Kibuishi
description: Emily, Navin, and their crew of resistance fighters charter an airship and set off in search of the legendary lost city of Cielis, hoping to find allies against the Elf King. The journey takes them through treacherous skies filled with storms, sky pirates, and dangerous creatures that make every moment a fight for survival. Emily struggles to control the growing power of her amulet while facing difficult decisions about who to trust. This third Amulet book soars with breathtaking aerial adventures and deepens the mystery of the stonekeepers' true purpose.

title: The Last Council
author: Kazu Kibuishi
description: Emily and her friends have finally reached the flying city of Cielis, hoping to find the Guardian Council and gain powerful allies in their fight against the Elf King. But the once-great city is not what it seems, and the remaining Council members harbor dark secrets of their own. Emily must navigate political intrigue and dangerous tests while discovering that the real enemy may be closer than she thinks. This fourth Amulet book delivers shocking twists and revelations that completely change the direction of the series.

title: Prince of the Elves
author: Kazu Kibuishi
description: After surviving the chaos at the Guardian Academy, Emily faces a new crisis as Max Griffin steals the Mother Stone and the Elf King forges ahead with his terrible plans. Emily must master her amulet's power while resisting the stone's attempts to control her, all while the fate of Alledia hangs in the balance. Meanwhile, the young elf prince Trellis begins to step out of his father's shadow and forge his own path. This fifth Amulet book is a turning point in the series with stunning artwork and major revelations about the true nature of the stonekeepers.

title: Escape from Lucien
author: Kazu Kibuishi
description: Navin and his classmates journey to the war-ravaged city of Lucien on a dangerous mission while Emily faces her own battles against the growing influence of her amulet's voice. The city is overrun by mysterious shadow creatures, and the group must fight their way through while searching for crucial allies. Navin steps into a leadership role and proves that courage comes in many forms, not just through magical powers. This sixth Amulet book delivers intense action sequences and emotional character growth as the war against the Elf King reaches a critical turning point.

title: Firelight
author: Kazu Kibuishi
description: Emily, Trellis, and Vigo visit Algos Island, where they can access and enter lost memories. They're hoping to uncover the events of Trellis's mysterious childhood -- knowledge they can use against the Elf King. What they discover is a dark secret that changes everything. Meanwhile, the Voice of E...

title: Supernova
author: Kazu Kibuishi
description: Emily has lost control of her amulet and is trapped in the Void, a mysterious dimension where she must find a way to escape the stone's corrupting influence. Meanwhile, her friends and allies mount a desperate defense against the Elf King's forces without their most powerful stonekeeper. The fate of Alledia rests on Emily's ability to confront the darkness within herself and find the strength to break free. This eighth Amulet book raises the emotional stakes to their highest point as the final battle for Alledia approaches.

title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
author: Ransom Riggs
description: A mysterious island. An abandoned orphanage. A strange collection of peculiar photographs. It all waits to be discovered in Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children, and unforgettable novel that mixes fiction and photography in a thrilling reading experience. As our story opens, a horrific fam...

title: Hollow City
author: Ransom Riggs
description: Having escaped Miss Peregrine's island by the skin of their teeth, Jacob Portman and his peculiar companions journey to London to find a way to save their beloved headmistress, who is trapped in bird form. But the city they arrive in is war-torn 1940s London, and the peculiar children must navigate bombing raids, hostile locals, and dangerous hollowgasts. As they search desperately for someone who can help Miss Peregrine, they discover that the threat they thought they had left behind is far closer than they imagined. Illustrated with haunting vintage photographs, this thrilling sequel plunges deeper into the mysterious world of the peculiar.

title: Library of Souls
author: Ransom Riggs
description: Time is running out for Jacob Portman and his peculiar friends as they venture into the nightmarish London of 1908 to rescue Miss Peregrine and the other captive ymbryne. The city is controlled by their most dangerous enemies, and Jacob must learn to harness his peculiar abilities in ways he never imagined possible. Their desperate quest leads them to a secret library that holds the key to defeating the hollowgast threat once and for all. This thrilling conclusion to the original trilogy is a dark and dazzling adventure that pushes the peculiar children to their absolute limits.

title: A Map of Days
author: Ransom Riggs
description: Having defeated the monstrous threat that nearly destroyed the peculiar world, Jacob Portman is back where his story began, in Florida. But now Miss Peregrine, Emma, and their peculiar friends are with him, and doing their best to blend into modern-day America. When Jacob discovers a secret cache left behind by his late grandfather Abe, it reveals a hidden world of American peculiars and a new kind of danger. As they investigate, the group uncovers a vast conspiracy that suggests the peculiar world is far bigger and more dangerous than they ever imagined.

title: The Conference of the Birds
author: Ransom Riggs
description: In the fifth book of the Miss Peregrine's Peculiar Children series, Jacob Portman and his friends are on a desperate mission to find Noor Pradesh, a peculiar girl who holds the key to an ancient prophecy. Their search takes them across America, where they encounter new allies and terrifying new threats from both the peculiar and normal worlds. As the prophecy's true meaning becomes clearer, Jacob realizes the stakes are far higher than anyone imagined. With danger closing in from all sides, the peculiar children must trust in each other to survive what comes next.

title: The Desolations of September
author: Ransom Riggs
description: The sixth and final book in the Miss Peregrine's Peculiar Children series brings Jacob Portman's extraordinary journey to a breathtaking conclusion. The peculiar world is under its greatest threat as a powerful ancient evil awakens, putting every loop and every peculiar child in mortal danger. Jacob and his friends must gather allies from across time and space for one last stand to protect everything they hold dear. Illustrated with evocative vintage photographs, this epic finale delivers the emotional payoff fans have been waiting for, as Jacob finally discovers what it means to be truly peculiar.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: Secret of the Red Arrow
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: Frank and Joe Hardy are drawn into a dangerous mystery when a classmate is attacked and a cryptic red arrow is left at the scene of the crime. The brothers discover that a shadowy criminal organization has infiltrated their school and is targeting students for a sinister purpose. Using their detective skills and quick thinking, the Hardys must unravel the conspiracy before more victims fall prey to the mysterious attackers. This exciting first book in the Hardy Boys Adventures series introduces a modern take on the beloved brothers with nonstop suspense and clever plotting.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: Mystery of the Phantom Heist
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: Frank and Joe Hardy investigate a series of increasingly dangerous pranks that are disrupting a major tech expo in Bayport. When the pranks escalate into what appears to be a carefully planned heist, the brothers realize that someone is using the chaos as a smokescreen for a much larger crime. With the help of their friends and their sharp detective instincts, Frank and Joe race to unmask the culprit before the final act of the phantom heist unfolds. This second Hardy Boys Adventures book delivers a clever mystery with twists that will keep readers guessing until the final pages.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: The Vanishing Game
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: When Frank and Joe Hardy visit their friend Daisy's newly acquired amusement park, what should be a fun day out turns into a baffling mystery. A patron has vanished after riding the park's most popular attraction, and the disappearance threatens to destroy Daisy's family business. The brothers launch an investigation, uncovering a web of suspects including disgruntled former employees and rival business owners. With the park's future hanging in the balance, Frank and Joe must solve the case before more people go missing and the park is shut down for good.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: Into Thin Air
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description:
When the daughter of an amusement-park owner goes missing, it’s anything but fun and games in this Hardy Boys adventure—a new take on the classic series.

Daisy Rodriguez is missing. Just like that, gone without a trace. Her father, Hector Rodriguez—owner of Funspot, Bayport’s local amusement p...

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: Peril at Granite Peak
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: When Frank and Joe Hardy head to Granite Peak ski resort for a much-needed vacation, they quickly discover that someone is trying to sabotage the mountain. Mysterious accidents plague the slopes, putting skiers in danger and threatening to shut down the resort. As the brothers investigate, they find themselves caught in a web of rivalries, grudges, and hidden motives among the resort staff and guests. With the dangers escalating and a blizzard approaching, Frank and Joe must crack the case before someone gets seriously hurt.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: The Battle of Bayport
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: Frank and Joe Hardy are participating in a Revolutionary War reenactment in Bayport when the fake battle suddenly becomes all too real. A participant is injured by what was supposed to be a harmless musket, and the brothers quickly realize this was no accident. As they dig into the mystery, they uncover bitter rivalries and hidden agendas among the reenactment group that point to a deliberate attack. With suspects on every side and the tension rising, the Hardy boys must piece together the clues before the culprit strikes again.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: Shadows at Predator Reef
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: When a massive sea turtle vanishes from the Bayport Aquarium, Frank and Joe Hardy dive into a mystery that runs deeper than anyone expected. Their investigation leads them to a network of underground tunnels hidden beneath the city, which are being used by a sinister smuggling ring dealing in rare and endangered marine life. As the brothers follow the trail, they find themselves in dangerous waters, facing criminals who will stop at nothing to protect their operation. This underwater adventure takes the Hardy Boys from the aquarium to the open sea in a thrilling race to shut down the smugglers.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: Deception on the Set
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: Frank and Joe Hardy land roles as extras on a movie being filmed in Bayport, but the production is plagued by a mysterious saboteur who seems determined to shut it down. As accidents become more dangerous and the list of suspects grows longer, the brothers must figure out who has the most to gain from destroying the film. The investigation takes them behind the scenes of moviemaking and into a web of jealousy, rivalry, and hidden motives. This eighth Hardy Boys Adventures book is a fast-paced and entertaining mystery set against the exciting backdrop of a Hollywood production.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: The Curse of the Ancient Emerald
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: When a priceless ancient emerald is donated to the Bayport Museum, strange and threatening events begin to occur, and an ominous curse seems to follow the jewel wherever it goes. Frank and Joe Hardy investigate and discover that someone is using the legend of the curse to cover up a very real and very daring theft. The brothers must separate supernatural superstition from criminal activity while racing to catch the thief before the emerald vanishes forever. This ninth Hardy Boys Adventures book combines historical intrigue with modern detective work in a mystery that is both spooky and satisfying.

series_author_group: Franklin W. Dixon — Hardy Boys Adventures
title: Tunnel of Secrets
author: Franklin W. Dixon
