description: When the Hardy brothers' famous detective father, Fenton Hardy, goes missing during an investigation into a mysterious vacant house, Frank and Joe know something is terribly wrong. The house has long been rumored to be haunted, but the brothers suspect something far more sinister is at work beneath its creepy exterior. As they search for their father, they discover a network of hidden tunnels and a criminal operation that has been using the house as a cover. With their dad's life on the line, the Hardy Boys must outsmart dangerous foes and unravel a decades-old secret to bring him home safely.

series_author_group: Max Brallier — Last Kids on Earth
title: The Last Kids on Earth
author: Max Brallier
description: When a monster apocalypse hits his town, thirteen-year-old Jack Sullivan does what any resourceful kid would do: he turns his tree house into a fortress and starts living his best post-apocalyptic life. Armed with a makeshift weapon and a lot of bravado, Jack assembles a ragtag team of friends, including his nerdy best pal Quint, tough-girl Dirk, and Jack's longtime crush June. Together they must battle an endless parade of zombies and monsters, including the eerily intelligent creature known as Blarg. Packed with hilarious illustrations and nonstop action, this is the ultimate kid survival adventure.

series_author_group: Max Brallier — Last Kids on Earth
title: The Last Kids on Earth and the Zombie Parade
author: Max Brallier
description: Something strange is happening in Jack Sullivan's post-apocalyptic world: the zombies are disappearing. While most people might consider this a good thing, Jack is deeply suspicious of the eerie shrieking noise that seems to be summoning the undead to an unknown location for an unknown and probably terrible purpose. With his best friends Quint, Dirk, and June at his side, Jack sets out to investigate, uncovering a terrifying new threat that makes the zombie apocalypse look like a warm-up act. Packed with hilarious illustrations and nonstop monster-fighting action, this second installment of the Last Kids on Earth series proves that in the apocalypse, things can always get weirder.

series_author_group: Max Brallier — Last Kids on Earth
title: The Last Kids on Earth and the Nightmare King
author: Max Brallier
description: Jack Sullivan and his post-apocalyptic crew face their most terrifying threat yet when a monstrous villain known as the Nightmare King rises to power. This ancient evil is unlike anything they have encountered before, commanding legions of the undead and twisted creatures. Jack and his friends must find a way to defeat this fearsome new enemy while navigating a world overrun by zombies and monsters. With hilarious illustrations and nonstop action, this third installment in the Last Kids on Earth series takes the adventure to thrilling new heights.

series_author_group: Max Brallier — Last Kids on Earth
title: The Last Kids on Earth and the Cosmic Beyond
author: Max Brallier
description: In the fourth installment of the Last Kids on Earth series, Jack Sullivan and his friends discover that the monster apocalypse is only the beginning. A massive portal has opened, connecting their world to a terrifying interdimensional realm filled with even more dangerous creatures. As Jack tries to figure out what this cosmic threat means for humanity's survival, he must also deal with monster alliances, new enemies, and the ever-present zombie hordes. With his signature humor and his loyal crew by his side, Jack faces the biggest challenge of his post-apocalyptic life in this wildly entertaining adventure.

series_author_group: Chris Columbus & Ned Vizzini — House of Secrets
title: House of Secrets
author: Chris Columbus & Ned Vizzini
description: When the Walker family moves into a mysterious old house once owned by a famous fantasy writer, siblings Brendan, Eleanor, and Cordelia discover that the house is a portal to the worlds within the author's books. Pulled into a terrifying adventure, the three children must battle pirates, warriors, and a power-hungry witch who wants to use the books' magic to take over the real world. Using their wits, bravery, and the bond they share as siblings, the Walkers must find a way to defeat the witch and escape back home. This thrilling fantasy adventure was hailed by J.K. Rowling as a breakneck, jam-packed roller coaster of a ride.

series_author_group: Chris Columbus & Ned Vizzini — House of Secrets
title: Battle of the Beasts
author: Chris Columbus & Ned Vizzini
description: The Walker siblings thought their adventures were over, but when they discover that the evil Wind Witch has survived and is gathering power for a devastating attack, they must return to the book worlds once more. Brendan, Eleanor, and Cordelia find themselves separated across different stories, each facing deadly challenges and terrifying enemies on their own. They must find their way back to each other while preventing the Wind Witch from merging the book worlds with reality. This action-packed sequel delivers even bigger stakes and more imaginative world-hopping than the first book.

series_author_group: Chris Columbus & Ned Vizzini — House of Secrets
title: Clash of the Worlds
author: Chris Columbus & Ned Vizzini
description: In the final House of Secrets adventure, the boundaries between the book worlds and reality are crumbling, and the Walker siblings must make their last stand against the forces threatening to destroy everything. Brendan, Eleanor, and Cordelia return to the most dangerous book worlds they have visited, gathering allies and weapons for the ultimate confrontation. The fate of both the real world and every fictional world depends on whether three ordinary kids can become the heroes the stories need. This explosive conclusion brings the trilogy to a satisfying and thrilling end that celebrates the power of stories and family.

title: The Blackthorn Key
author: Kevin Sands
description: Christopher Rowe is an apprentice apothecary in 1665 London, happily learning the trade of mixing medicines and solving puzzles under the guidance of his kind master, Benedict Blackthorn. But when a mysterious cult begins murdering apothecaries across the city, Benedict gives Christopher a cryptic warning and a coded message before he too falls victim. Christopher must use his puzzle-solving skills and knowledge of codes and chemistry to unravel the mystery before the killers come for him next. This gripping historical mystery is packed with codes, danger, and fascinating details about the world of 17th-century science and alchemy.

title: Mark of the Plague
author: Kevin Sands
description: The year is 1665, and the Black Plague is devastating London, turning the once-thriving city into a place of death and despair. Young apothecary apprentice Christopher Rowe and his faithful friend Tom must navigate the plague-ravaged streets while following a trail of puzzles, riddles, and coded messages left by Christopher's late master. An assassin is hunting them, and a dark conspiracy connects the plague to a secret that powerful people will kill to protect. Risking their lives at every turn, Christopher and Tom must use their wits and their knowledge of potions and cures to unravel the mystery before the plague or the assassin claims them both.

title: The Assassin's Curse
author: Kevin Sands
description: When Christopher Rowe's code-breaking talents uncover the true target of an assassination attempt on the King of France, he and his friends are ordered to Paris to investigate. A centuries-old curse on the French throne has been revived, and the assassins will stop at nothing to see it fulfilled. In the glittering and dangerous world of 17th-century Paris, Christopher must decipher ancient codes and navigate deadly court intrigue to save the king's life. With his master's teachings guiding him and his friends by his side, Christopher faces his most perilous adventure yet in this thrilling third installment of the Blackthorn Key series.

title: Call of the Wraith
author: Kevin Sands
description: Christopher Rowe has no idea who he is. After being shipwrecked in Devonshire, he wakes up alone, his memories gone. Villagers tell him he was possessed by an unseen evil, and only became conscious after being visited by the local witch. As Christopher tries to get his bearings, he realizes his c...

series_author_group: Michelle Paver — Chronicles of Ancient Darkness
title: Wolf Brother
author: Michelle Paver
description: Six thousand years ago, an evil force was unleashed on the world, and now twelve-year-old Torak must find a way to stop it. After his father is killed by a demon-possessed bear, Torak sets out alone into the ancient forest with nothing but his father's last words to guide him. Along the way, he befriends a young wolf cub and meets Renn, a girl from the Raven Clan who becomes an unlikely ally. Together they embark on a perilous quest to find the Mountain of the World Spirit, the only hope of defeating the demonic bear before it destroys everything in its path.

series_author_group: Michelle Paver — Chronicles of Ancient Darkness
title: Spirit Walker
author: Michelle Paver
description: A mysterious and deadly sickness is sweeping through the clans, and twelve-year-old Torak must find a cure before it destroys everyone he cares about. With his faithful companions Renn and Wolf at his side, Torak embarks on a dangerous journey to the far reaches of the ancient world, traveling by sea to strange and hostile lands. Along the way, he encounters terrifying sea creatures, unfriendly clans, and dark magic that threatens to overwhelm him. This gripping second installment in the Chronicles of Ancient Darkness plunges deeper into a prehistoric world full of wonder and danger.

series_author_group: Michelle Paver — Chronicles of Ancient Darkness
title: Soul Eater
author: Michelle Paver
description: When Torak's beloved companion Wolf is captured by the sinister Soul-Eaters, a group of renegade mages who seek to dominate the ancient world through dark magic, Torak will stop at nothing to rescue him. To find the Soul-Eaters' hidden stronghold in the frozen Far North, Torak must disguise himself and infiltrate their ranks, risking discovery at every turn. Meanwhile, Renn embarks on her own dangerous mission to help from the outside. In this chilling third volume of the Chronicles of Ancient Darkness, Torak faces his most terrifying enemies yet in a desperate race across the icy wilderness.

series_author_group: Michelle Paver — Chronicles of Ancient Darkness
title: Outcast
author: Michelle Paver
description: Torak has been branded an outcast, cast out from the clans and forced to survive alone in the ancient wilderness. Forbidden to speak to anyone, take shelter, or receive help from any clan member, Torak must endure the harshest punishment the forest peoples can inflict. But even as he struggles to survive on his own, a deadly menace is rising that threatens all the clans, and Torak is the only one who can stop it. With Wolf and Renn refusing to abandon him despite the danger, Torak must clear his name and confront the evil Soul-Eaters once more.

series_author_group: Michelle Paver — Chronicles of Ancient Darkness
title: Oath Breaker
author: Michelle Paver
description: In the fifth book of the Chronicles of Ancient Darkness, Torak is haunted by a devastating loss as one of the remaining Soul-Eaters strikes at the heart of everything he holds dear. A friend has been murdered, and Torak burns with a desire for vengeance that threatens to consume him. As he tracks the killer deep into the forest, Torak must battle not only external enemies but also the darkness within himself. Renn and Wolf fear they are losing him to his rage, and only the bonds of friendship and loyalty can pull Torak back from the brink before it is too late.

series_author_group: Michelle Paver — Chronicles of Ancient Darkness
title: Ghost Hunter
author: Michelle Paver
description: In the epic conclusion to the Chronicles of Ancient Darkness, Torak faces the most powerful and dangerous Soul-Eater of all: Eostra, the Owl Mage, who commands an army of ghosts and dark spirits. As winter grips the forest and terror spreads through the clans, Torak must journey to the Mountain of Ghosts for a final confrontation that will determine the fate of the ancient world. With Renn and Wolf by his side, Torak draws on everything he has learned throughout his incredible journey to face his destiny. This stunning finale brings the beloved prehistoric saga to a satisfying and emotional close.

title: The Elenium (Trilogy Omnibus)
author: David Eddings
description: This massive omnibus edition collects all three novels of David Eddings' epic Elenium trilogy: The Diamond Throne, The Ruby Knight, and The Sapphire Rose. Sir Sparhawk, a Pandion Knight and the Queen's Champion, returns from exile to find his beloved Queen Ehlana encased in crystal by dark magic, and the kingdom under the control of a corrupt regent. With the help of his loyal companions and the forbidden magic of the Church Knights, Sparhawk embarks on a perilous quest to find the legendary Bhelliom, a powerful jewel that may be the only hope to save his queen. This sweeping fantasy adventure is filled with political intrigue, sword fights, sorcery, and unforgettable characters.

title: The Tamuli (Trilogy Omnibus)
author: David Eddings
description: This omnibus edition collects all three novels of David Eddings' epic Tamuli trilogy, the sequel to The Elenium. Sparhawk, now the Prince Consort of Elenia, is called upon once again when strange supernatural events begin plaguing the Tamul Empire far to the east. Joined by his companions and armed with the magical jewel Bhelliom, Sparhawk must unravel a conspiracy that threatens to tear the empire apart. Filled with political intrigue, dark sorcery, and epic battles, this sweeping fantasy adventure spans over a thousand pages of grand storytelling.

title: The Magic Faraway Tree
author: Enid Blyton
description: Joe, Beth, and Frannie discover an enchanted wood near their new home, and at its heart stands the most extraordinary tree imaginable: the Faraway Tree. This magical tree is home to wonderful characters like Moonface, the Saucepan Man, and Silky the fairy, who become the children's dearest friends. At the very top of the tree, different magical lands come and go, from the Land of Birthdays to the Land of Do-As-You-Please, each offering incredible adventures. But the children must be careful, because some lands are delightful and others are decidedly dangerous, and they must leave before the lands move on or risk being trapped forever.

title: The Folk of the Faraway Tree
author: Enid Blyton
description: Joe, Beth, and Frannie return to the Enchanted Wood and their wonderful friends who live in the Faraway Tree, including the quirky Moonface, the grumpy Saucepan Man, and the wise Silky the fairy. At the very top of the tree, different magical lands come and go, and each visit brings a new and exciting adventure. From the Land of Birthdays to the Land of Do-As-You-Please, the children explore incredible worlds but must always remember to leave before the lands move on. This beloved classic by Enid Blyton is a timeless tale of imagination and friendship that has delighted generations of young readers.

title: Famous Five Collection 1 (Books 1-5)
author: Enid Blyton
description: Julian, Dick, Anne, George and Timmy the dog find excitement and adventure wherever they go in Enid Blyton's most popular series. In their first adventure, the Famous Five find a shipwreck off Kirrin Island. But where is the treasure? The Famous Five are on the trail, looking for clues, but they'...

title: Famous Five Collection 2 (Books 6-10)
author: Enid Blyton
description: This bumper collection contains books six through ten of Enid Blyton's beloved Famous Five series, featuring Julian, Dick, Anne, George, and their loyal dog Timmy. From circus caravans to secret caves, the Five stumble into one thrilling adventure after another, uncovering smugglers, thieves, and hidden treasures along the way. Each story is packed with mystery, friendship, and the excitement of exploring the great outdoors. Perfect for young readers who love classic adventure tales full of daring escapades and unexpected twists.

title: Gregor the Overlander
author: Suzanne Collins
description: When eleven-year-old Gregor and his two-year-old sister Boots fall through a grate in their New York City apartment building, they tumble into the Underland, a vast underground world populated by humans, giant bats, rats, cockroaches, and spiders. Gregor quickly discovers that his arrival has been foretold by an ancient prophecy, one that names him as a warrior destined to lead a dangerous quest. With his baby sister in tow and no way home, Gregor must navigate the complex politics and deadly conflicts of the Underland. This gripping adventure from the author of The Hunger Games is a tale of courage, family, and the discovery that heroes can come from the most unexpected places.

title: Gregor and the Prophecy of Bane
author: Suzanne Collins
description: In his second adventure, eleven-year-old Gregor must return to the dangerous Underland beneath New York City when his beloved baby sister Boots is kidnapped by giant rats. A new prophecy has emerged, one that speaks of a terrifying creature called the Bane that could upset the delicate balance of power in the underground world. Gregor reluctantly takes on the role of warrior once again, venturing deep into uncharted tunnels with unlikely allies to rescue Boots and confront the Bane. This thrilling sequel deepens the world-building and raises the stakes as Gregor discovers that the Underland's problems are far from over.

title: Gregor and the Curse of the Warmbloods
author: Suzanne Collins
description: A deadly plague is sweeping through the Underland, killing warmbloods at an alarming rate, and a new prophecy reveals that Gregor is once again the key to finding a cure. Gregor must journey to the dangerous Vineyard of Eyes, accompanied by a team that includes friends and enemies alike, to locate the source of the plague before it wipes out entire species. Along the way, he confronts the terrifying reality that someone may have deliberately unleashed the disease as a weapon of war. This third installment in the Underland Chronicles combines thrilling adventure with powerful themes of trust, sacrifice, and the costs of conflict.

title: Gregor and the Marks of Secret
author: Suzanne Collins
description: Twelve-year-old Gregor returns to the Underland beneath New York City and discovers a horrifying secret: the tiny mice-like Nibblers are being systematically hunted and exterminated by the growing army of the Bane, a monstrous adolescent rat king. Gregor joins forces with Princess Luxa and the cunning rat Ripred to investigate the Marks of Secret, a mysterious prophecy that may hold the key to stopping the genocide. As the truth unfolds, Gregor is forced to confront the darkest aspects of the Underland's politics and warfare. This fourth installment in the Underland Chronicles tackles powerful themes of prejudice and moral courage in a gripping story that will keep readers turning pages.

title: Gregor and the Code of Claw
author: Suzanne Collins
description: Everyone has been trying to keep Gregor from seeing The Prophecy of Time. That is because the final prophecy calls for the warrior's death. With an army of rats quickly approaching and time running out, Gregor must defend Regalia and get his family back home safely. There is a code that must be c...

title: Wonder
author: R.J. Palacio
description: August Pullman was born with severe facial differences that have prevented him from going to a mainstream school until now. Starting fifth grade at Beecher Prep, Auggie just wants to be treated as an ordinary kid, but his extraordinary face makes that impossible. Told from multiple perspectives, including Auggie's classmates, his sister, and her boyfriend, Wonder follows Auggie's journey through the trials of fitting in, making friends, and facing bullies. This heartwarming and thought-provoking novel reminds readers that everyone deserves kindness, and that true beauty lies in who we are on the inside.

title: Mouseheart
author: Lisa Fiedler
description: The Warriors series meets Redwall in this first book in an epic animal adventure series set in the subway tunnels of Brooklyn. Hopper is just an ordinary pet shop mouse before he escapes. Soon he finds himself below the bustling streets of Brooklyn, deep within the untamed tangles of transit tunnels, and in Atlantia, a glorious utopian rat civilization. But all is not what it seems. Though Hopper is treated as a royal guest, he misses his siblings that he lost in the escape attempt. That, and...

title: Mouseheart: Return of the Forgotten
author: Lisa Fiedler
description: In the thrilling conclusion to the Mouseheart trilogy, Hopper and his friends in the underground city of Atlantia face their most dangerous threat yet as long-forgotten enemies resurface with a vengeance. The fragile peace between the rats, mice, and cats of the subway tunnels is shattered when ancient forces rise to claim control of the underground world. Hopper must rally his allies and summon every ounce of courage to protect the rodent civilization he helped rebuild. This action-packed finale brings the epic tale of a brave pet shop mouse to an unforgettable close.

title: Hopper's Destiny
author: Lisa Fiedler
description: Hopper the mouse is determined to rebuild the fallen empire of Atlantia, the underground rat civilization beneath the streets of Brooklyn. But the path to peace is filled with danger as old enemies scheme in the shadows and new threats emerge from the unexplored tunnels. Hopper must draw on all his courage and the loyalty of his friends to unite the warring factions and create a future worth fighting for. This exciting middle chapter in the Mouseheart trilogy delivers adventure, friendship, and the kind of epic battles that will thrill fans of Redwall and Warriors.

series_author_group: Rosemary Sutcliff — Black Ships Before Troy
title: Black Ships Before Troy
author: Rosemary Sutcliff
description: Rosemary Sutcliff masterfully retells the epic story of the Trojan War, bringing the ancient Greek legends to vivid life for young readers. From the fateful quarrel over the golden apple and the flight of beautiful Helen with Paris of Troy, to the ten-year siege and the cunning stratagem of the wooden horse, every dramatic moment is captured with grace and power. Readers will meet legendary heroes like Achilles, Hector, Odysseus, and Ajax as they fight for glory, honor, and survival on the plains before Troy. Beautifully illustrated, this is a perfect introduction to one of the greatest stories ever told.

series_author_group: Rosemary Sutcliff — The King Arthur Trilogy
title: The King Arthur Trilogy
author: Rosemary Sutcliff
description: This omnibus edition collects Rosemary Sutcliff's three magnificent retellings of the Arthurian legends: The Sword and the Circle, The Light Beyond the Forest, and The Road to Camlann. From the magical moment Arthur draws the sword from the stone to the tragic final battle at Camlann, Sutcliff brings the full sweep of the Arthurian saga to life with lyrical prose and vivid characterization. Readers will follow the Knights of the Round Table on their quests for the Holy Grail, witness the doomed love of Lancelot and Guinevere, and experience the rise and fall of Camelot. This is the definitive retelling of King Arthur's legend for young readers, rich with adventure, honor, and heartbreak.

title: The Butterfly Lion
author: Michael Morpurgo
description: A young boy running away from boarding school stumbles upon a grand old house and meets an elderly woman named Millie, who tells him the remarkable story of Bertie, a boy who grew up in Africa and rescued an orphaned white lion cub. Bertie raised the lion with love and devotion, but when circumstances forced them apart, their bond endured across oceans and decades. Millie's tale spans two world wars and stretches from the wilds of Africa to the fields of France and the English countryside. This beautiful and moving story by Michael Morpurgo celebrates the unbreakable connection between a boy and the animal he loves.

title: Running Wild
author: Michael Morpurgo
description: When 10-year-old Will's father dies in the Iraq war, his mother surprises him with a trip to Indonesia. She couldn't have known what awaited them both there. The first Will knows that anything is wrong is when Oona, the elephant he is riding along the beach, begins to spook. Then, suddenly, she t...

title: War Horse
author: Michael Morpurgo
description: Told from the perspective of a horse named Joey, this powerful novel follows his journey from the peaceful English countryside to the devastating battlefields of World War I. When Joey is sold to the army and shipped to France, he experiences the horrors of the trenches, serving on both sides of the conflict and touching the lives of soldiers, farmers, and veterinarians along the way. Meanwhile, Albert, the young boy who raised Joey, enlists underage and crosses the Channel determined to find his beloved horse. Michael Morpurgo's unforgettable story is a moving testament to the bond between humans and animals, and the enduring hope that survives even in the darkest times.

title: Chess Tactics for Kids
author: Murray Chandler
description: Chess Tactics for Kids is a highly accessible guide that teaches young players the essential tactical patterns they need to win games. Written by Grandmaster Murray Chandler, the book covers 50 of the most important chess tactics, from simple forks and pins to devastating combinations and sacrifices. Each tactic is clearly explained with diagrams and real-game examples that make learning fun and easy to follow. Whether you are a complete beginner or an improving player looking to sharpen your skills, this book provides the tactical toolkit every young chess enthusiast needs.

title: How to Beat Your Dad at Chess
author: Murray Chandler
description: This is a chess book for everyone, from eight to eighty, beginner to master. In a clear, easy-to-follow format it explains how the best way to beat a stronger opponent (be it a friend, clubmate – or Dad!) is by cleverly forcing checkmate. Delightful and instructive positions from real games are u...

title: Inkheart
author: Cornelia Funke
description: Meggie loves books, just like her father Mo, a bookbinder with an extraordinary secret: when he reads aloud, characters from stories come to life. One stormy night, a mysterious stranger named Dustfinger arrives at their door, warning Mo about the villainous Capricorn, a character Mo accidentally read out of a book called Inkheart years ago. Now Capricorn wants Mo's power for his own dark purposes, and Meggie discovers that her father's gift comes at a terrible price. This enchanting tale celebrates the magic of books while spinning a thrilling adventure about the dangerous line between fiction and reality.

title: Inkspell
author: Cornelia Funke
description: In the stunning sequel to Inkheart, Dustfinger has found a way back into the Inkworld, the magical realm from which he was read out long ago. But his return sets off a chain of events that pulls Meggie, her father Mo, and their loved ones into the dangerous world of the story. Within the Inkworld, a ruthless tyrant called the Adderhead rules with an iron fist, and the characters from the book are caught between revolution and despair. Meggie discovers she has inherited her father's extraordinary gift of reading things to life, and must use it to protect everyone she loves in a world where the line between author and character has become impossibly blurred.

title: Inkdeath
author: Cornelia Funke
description: In the breathtaking conclusion to the Inkworld trilogy, Mo has become the Bluejay, a legendary outlaw figure in the Inkworld, and the boundary between fiction and reality has become dangerously thin. When his beloved friend Dustfinger is lost to the realm of the dead, Mo must confront Death itself to bring him back, but the price may be higher than he can pay. The tyrannical Adderhead is growing more powerful, and only the White Book, with its mysterious three words, holds the key to stopping him once and for all. Meggie, Mo, and their allies must make impossible sacrifices in this sweeping finale that explores the deepest questions about storytelling, mortality, and the power of love.

title: Tintenherz (Inkheart)
author: Cornelia Funke
description: This is the original German edition of Cornelia Funke's beloved fantasy novel Inkheart. Meggie's father Mo has an extraordinary gift: when he reads aloud, characters leap out of the pages and into the real world. But this power has a dark side, and when the villain Capricorn comes looking for Mo, Meggie is pulled into a dangerous adventure that blurs the line between stories and reality. A magical tale about the power of books and the courage of a young girl, perfect for readers who dream of living inside their favorite stories.

title: A Wrinkle in Time
author: Madeleine L'Engle
description: Meg Murry is an awkward, stubborn girl whose scientist father has mysteriously disappeared. When three eccentric celestial beings, Mrs Whatsit, Mrs Who, and Mrs Which, reveal that Mr. Murry is being held captive on a distant planet by a terrible evil force called the Black Thing, Meg embarks on a mind-bending journey through space and time with her brilliant little brother Charles Wallace and her friend Calvin. Using a tesseract, a wrinkle in the fabric of space-time, the children travel to strange worlds and face unimaginable dangers. This groundbreaking classic explores themes of love, individuality, and the battle between light and darkness in a story that has captivated readers for generations.

title: In the Shadow of Heroes
author: Nicholas Bowling
description: Cadmus is a young slave boy in Ancient Rome who stumbles upon a conspiracy that reaches to the very heart of the Roman Empire. When he discovers that his master, the legendary hero Titus, may not be the noble figure everyone believes, Cadmus must decide where his loyalty lies. Alongside a sharp-witted girl named Tog, he navigates the treacherous streets of Rome, dodging assassins and uncovering secrets that could change the course of history. This gripping historical adventure is full of twists, ancient intrigue, and the kind of danger that lurks behind every marble column.

title: His Royal Whiskers
author: Sam Gayton
description: Something bad has happened to Prince Alexander, the only heir to the mighty Petrossian Empire and its bloodthirsty Czar. Something worse than kidnapping. Something worse than murder. Somehow, the Prince has been miraculously transformed into a tiny kitten. Why has this terrible catastrophe happen...

title: Drama
author: Raina Telgemeier
description: Callie loves theater more than anything and is thrilled to be the set designer for her middle school's production of a musical, even though she cannot carry a tune herself. As opening night approaches, Callie navigates the drama both onstage and off, dealing with crushes, friendship challenges, and the pressure of creating the perfect set. When two new students join the crew, Callie's life gets even more complicated and exciting in ways she never expected. This charming and heartfelt graphic novel by Raina Telgemeier is a funny and moving story about finding your place and being true to yourself.

title: The Christmasaurus
author: Tom Fletcher
description: William Trundle is a boy who loves Christmas more than anything in the world, even though life has not always been kind to him. Far away at the North Pole, Santa's elves discover a strange, frozen egg buried deep in the ice, and from it hatches a baby dinosaur, the last of its kind: the Christmasaurus. When William and the Christmasaurus's paths cross on Christmas Eve, they embark on a magical adventure that takes them on a journey through the skies and into the heart of what makes Christmas truly special. This enchanting story by Tom Fletcher is filled with wonder, friendship, and the belief that extraordinary things can happen when you least expect them.

title: Head Kid
author: David Baddiel
description: Ryan Ward is the naughtiest, most troublesome kid at his school, and Mr. Carter is the strictest, most no-nonsense headmaster imaginable. When a freak accident causes them to swap bodies, chaos erupts on an epic scale. Ryan, stuck in the headmaster's body, must navigate staff meetings, parent conferences, and the terrifying world of adult responsibilities. Meanwhile, Mr. Carter finds himself trapped in the body of a mischievous schoolboy, surrounded by homework, cafeteria food, and playground politics. This laugh-out-loud comedy from David Baddiel is a hilarious exploration of what happens when the rules get completely turned upside down.

title: Call Me By Your Name
author: André Aciman
description: During the summer of 1983 in the Italian Riviera, seventeen-year-old Elio Perlman becomes fascinated by Oliver, the confident American scholar who has come to stay at his family's villa. What begins as curiosity and admiration slowly transforms into a passionate and life-changing summer romance that neither of them expected. Elio navigates the intensity of first love with all its joy, confusion, and vulnerability against the sun-drenched backdrop of the Mediterranean coast. This luminous novel by Andre Aciman is a deeply moving exploration of desire, identity, and the memories that shape us long after summer ends.

title: Rich People Problems
author: Kevin Kwan
description: In the uproarious conclusion to the Crazy Rich Asians trilogy, the Shang-Young family is thrown into chaos when the matriarch, Su Yi, falls gravely ill, and a battle erupts over her legendary estate, Tyersall Park, one of the last great houses of Asia. Nick Young finds himself locked out of his inheritance by scheming relatives, while his wife Rachel tries to navigate the treacherous waters of ultra-wealthy family politics. From extravagant weddings to couture gown sabotage, the gloves come off as every branch of the family fights for their share of the fortune. Kevin Kwan delivers a hilarious and addictive finale packed with jaw-dropping wealth, family drama, and unforgettable characters.

title: Raising Boys
author: Steve Biddulph
description: This internationally bestselling parenting guide by Steve Biddulph offers essential advice for raising happy, healthy boys from birth through to adulthood. Drawing on the latest research in child development and psychology, Biddulph explores the key stages of boys' growth and the unique challenges they face at each age. The book covers topics including testosterone and brain development, the importance of fathers, building emotional intelligence, and helping boys navigate school and friendships. Practical, warm, and full of real-world insights, this is a must-read guide for parents, teachers, and anyone involved in raising the next generation of young men.

title: Epic Zero: Books 1-3 Collection
author: R.L. Ullman
description: This collection contains the first three books in the Epic Zero series, following Elliott Harkness, the only powerless kid in a family of legendary superheroes. While his parents and sister have amazing abilities, Elliott has been classified as a Meta Zero, someone with no powers at all. But when a world-ending threat emerges that even the most powerful heroes cannot stop, Elliott discovers that being underestimated might be his greatest strength. Packed with humor, action, and heart, this series is perfect for young readers who have ever felt like they did not fit in and dreamed of proving everyone wrong.

title: Jake Atlas and the Hunt for the Feathered God
author: Rob Lloyd Jones
description: Jake Atlas and his family are treasure-hunting adventurers who travel the globe in search of ancient artifacts and lost civilizations. When they receive a mysterious clue pointing to a legendary Aztec artifact with incredible powers, the Atlas family sets off on a perilous quest through jungles, ruins, and booby-trapped temples. But they are not the only ones searching for the treasure, and a ruthless rival will stop at nothing to get there first. This fast-paced adventure is perfect for fans of Indiana Jones-style quests, packed with puzzles, danger, and family teamwork.

title: The Dark Side of the Light Chasers
author: Debbie Ford
description: In this transformative self-help book, Debbie Ford explores the hidden aspects of our personalities that we try to suppress and ignore. She argues that by embracing our so-called dark side, including our fears, flaws, and shadow selves, we can achieve wholeness and unlock our true potential. Drawing on Jungian psychology and her own personal journey, Ford provides practical exercises and insights to help readers reclaim the parts of themselves they have disowned. This powerful and compassionate guide shows that the path to authentic living begins with accepting every part of who we are.

title: You Are a Badass
author: Jen Sincero
description: Jen Sincero's bestselling self-help guide is a refreshingly honest and hilarious roadmap for anyone who wants to improve their life but is not sure where to start. Drawing on her own transformation from broke and frustrated to successful and fulfilled, Sincero offers practical advice, entertaining stories, and exercises to help readers identify and change the self-sabotaging beliefs that hold them back. The book covers everything from mastering your mindset and overcoming fear to creating the life you actually want to live. With its irreverent humor and no-nonsense approach, this book has helped millions of readers around the world unleash their inner badass.

title: Timmy Failure: Mistakes Were Made
author: Stephan Pastis
description: Timmy Failure is the eleven-year-old founder and CEO of Total Failure Inc., the best detective agency in town, perhaps the best detective agency in the world. His business partner is a 1,500-pound polar bear named Total, who is not exactly the most reliable assistant. When Timmy's teacher's Segway goes missing and the school's Halloween candy fund vanishes, Timmy takes on the cases with his unique brand of overconfident incompetence. Told through Timmy's hilariously unreliable narration and illustrated with funny drawings throughout, this is a brilliantly comic adventure about the world's most clueless detective.

title: The Culture Map
author: Erin Meyer
description: Erin Meyer's groundbreaking guide helps professionals navigate the invisible cultural differences that can make or break international business relationships. Drawing on extensive research and real-world examples from around the globe, Meyer maps out eight key dimensions where cultures differ, from communication styles and leadership approaches to decision-making and trust-building. The book provides practical strategies for working effectively across cultural boundaries, whether leading a multinational team or negotiating with foreign partners. This essential read for anyone working in today's global economy will transform how you understand and interact with colleagues and clients from different cultural backgrounds.

title: D'Aulaires' Book of Greek Myths
author: Ingri & Edgar Parin d'Aulaire
description: This beloved classic brings the myths of ancient Greece to life through stunning illustrations and accessible storytelling by Ingri and Edgar Parin d'Aulaire. From the creation of the world and the reign of the Titans to the heroic adventures of Perseus, Heracles, and Theseus, every major myth is retold with charm and clarity. The book covers the entire Greek pantheon, including Zeus, Athena, Apollo, Aphrodite, and many more, explaining their powers, personalities, and legendary quarrels. Generations of readers have been introduced to Greek mythology through this essential and beautifully illustrated volume, making it a perfect starting point for young myth enthusiasts.

title: Pokémon Deluxe Essential Handbook
author: Scholastic
description: This deluxe edition of the essential Pokemon handbook is the ultimate reference guide for trainers of all ages. Covering over 700 Pokemon from every region, it includes detailed stats, types, moves, evolutions, and abilities for each creature. The entries are organized alphabetically for easy reference, with colorful illustrations of every Pokemon included. Whether you are trying to complete your Pokedex, plan the perfect battle strategy, or simply learn more about your favorite Pokemon, this comprehensive handbook has everything you need to become a true Pokemon master.

title: Giraffe's Can't Dance
author: Giles Andreae
description: Gerald the giraffe longs to dance at the annual Jungle Dance, but his long, gangly legs make him clumsy and all the other animals laugh at his awkward attempts. Humiliated and alone, Gerald wanders away from the dance, convinced he will never be able to move gracefully. But then a wise cricket offers him some magical advice: sometimes all you need is a different song. When Gerald finds the music that speaks to his heart, he discovers he can dance beautifully in his own unique way, inspiring everyone around him. This joyful picture book celebrates individuality and the courage to be yourself.

title: Singapore Colonial Style
author: Unknown
description: This stunning coffee-table book offers a photographic exploration of Singapore's magnificent colonial-era architecture and interiors. Through gorgeous photographs and insightful text, it showcases the unique blend of Eastern and Western design that defines Singapore's heritage buildings, from grand government halls to elegant private residences. The book captures the tropical adaptations, ornate details, and cultural influences that make Singapore's colonial style distinctive among Southeast Asian cities. A beautiful tribute to an architectural legacy that reflects the island's rich multicultural history.

title: The Shakespeare Stealer
author: Gary Blackwood
description: In Elizabethan England, a young orphan named Widge is trained by his unscrupulous master in the art of shorthand so he can secretly transcribe Shakespeare's plays during performances. Sent to the Globe Theatre to steal the script of Hamlet, Widge unexpectedly finds himself befriended by the actors and welcomed into their company. Torn between his loyalty to his cruel master and his growing affection for his new theatrical friends, Widge must make an impossible choice that will determine his future. This captivating historical adventure brings Shakespeare's London to vivid life and explores themes of loyalty, identity, and the power of words.

title: Flying Furballs
author: Donovan Bixley
description: In the first book of the Flying Furballs series, a squadron of brave and slightly foolish cats take to the skies in rickety biplanes during World War One. Claude D'Bonair and his fellow feline pilots must battle their sworn enemies, the dastardly dogfighting dogs of the opposing side. With thrilling aerial combat, slapstick humor, and charming illustrations, this story brings the drama of early aviation to life in the most entertaining way possible. Perfect for young readers who love animals, adventure, and laugh-out-loud comedy.

title: Dogfighty
author: Donovan Bixley
description: The fearless feline pilots of the Flying Furballs squadron are back for more high-flying action in this hilarious sequel. Claude D'Bonair and his crew face their toughest aerial challenges yet as the dogfighting dogs launch their most cunning attacks. With new missions, bigger explosions, and even more outrageous aerial stunts, the cats must push their biplanes to the limit to survive. This wildly funny illustrated adventure combines World War One history with animal comedy in a way that will have young readers laughing and cheering on every page.

series_author_group: Chris Colfer — Land of Stories spin-off
title: A Tale of Magic
author: Chris Colfer
description: In a world where magic is outlawed and women are forbidden to read, fourteen-year-old Brystal Evergreen secretly teaches herself to read in a library's hidden room of banned books. When she accidentally discovers that she possesses powerful magical abilities, her secret is exposed and she is sentenced to a notorious workhouse for wayward girls. Rescued by the mysterious Madame Weatherberry, Brystal is taken to an enchanted academy where she and other gifted children learn to harness their powers. But a dark force is rising that threatens to destroy the fragile peace between the magical and non-magical worlds, and Brystal may be the only one who can stop it.

title: Not So Normal Norbert
author: James Patterson
description: In a future where everyone on Earth strives to be completely normal, being judged Different is the worst thing that can happen. Norbert, along with his friends Drew and Sophie, has been branded as Different and banished to Astronuts Camp on the distant planet Zorquat 3 in the Orion Nebula. But Norbert is on a secret quest to find his missing parents, and being shipped to the far reaches of space puts a serious dent in his plans. This laugh-out-loud sci-fi adventure from James Patterson celebrates individuality and proves that being different is actually the most extraordinary thing you can be.

title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
author: J.K. Rowling
description: Harry Potter's summer has included the worst birthday ever, dire warnings from a house-elf called Dobby, and a daring rescue from the Dursleys by his friend Ron Weasley in a magical flying car. Back at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry for his second year, Harry hears strange whispers echo through empty corridors, and then attacks begin to happen. Students are found mysteriously turned to stone, and a terrifying message on the wall announces that the legendary Chamber of Secrets has been opened. Harry must use all of his magical abilities and courage to uncover the dark force behind these attacks before it is too late.

title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
author: J.K. Rowling
description: For Harry Potter, the summer before his third year at Hogwarts is another dismal stretch at the Dursleys, until he accidentally inflates his horrible Aunt Marge and flees into the night. A terrifying escaped prisoner named Sirius Black is on the loose, and the Dementors of Azkaban have been deployed to guard Hogwarts against him. Everyone believes Black is hunting Harry, but the truth behind his escape is far more complicated and personal than anyone suspects. As Harry learns more about his parents and their past, he discovers that not everything is as it seems, and that the real danger may lie closer than he thinks.

title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: Harry Potter has never even heard of Hogwarts when mysterious letters start arriving at number four, Privet Drive. Raised by his horrible aunt and uncle, the Dursleys, Harry has spent his whole life being told his parents died in a car crash and that magic does not exist. But on his eleventh birthday, a giant named Hagrid bursts in with astonishing news: Harry is a wizard, and he has a place waiting for him at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. As Harry discovers a magical world of broomstick flying, potion brewing, and dark forces, he learns that his destiny is far greater than he ever imagined.

title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
author: J.K. Rowling
description: Harry Potter's fourth year at Hogwarts is marked by the extraordinary Triwizard Tournament, a dangerous magical competition between three wizarding schools that has not been held for over a century. When Harry is mysteriously selected as a fourth champion despite being underage, he must face three terrifying tasks that test his courage, intelligence, and magical ability. But behind the excitement of the tournament, dark forces are stirring, and Lord Voldemort's followers are growing bolder. This pivotal installment in the Harry Potter series marks a dramatic turning point as the wizarding world is forever changed by the events of a single night.

title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
author: J.K. Rowling
description: Harry Potter returns to Hogwarts for his fifth year to find the wizarding world in denial about Voldemort's return, and the Ministry of Magic has sent the cruel Dolores Umbridge to take control of the school. Frustrated and angry, Harry forms a secret student group called Dumbledore's Army to teach his classmates real defensive magic. Meanwhile, a mysterious connection to Voldemort's mind grows stronger, and Harry discovers the existence of a prophecy that reveals the true nature of his destiny. This longest and most emotionally intense Harry Potter book explores themes of resistance, loss, and the burden of being the Chosen One.

title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
author: J.K. Rowling
description: As Voldemort's power grows stronger and darkness spreads across both the wizarding and Muggle worlds, Dumbledore prepares Harry for the final battle by revealing the Dark Lord's past through a series of private lessons. Harry also discovers a mysterious old textbook belonging to the Half-Blood Prince, whose handwritten spells and notes make him a star in Potions class. Meanwhile, Draco Malfoy is acting suspiciously, and Harry becomes convinced he is working for Voldemort. This penultimate Harry Potter book is both a gripping mystery and a deeply moving story that builds to one of the most shocking and heartbreaking moments in the entire series.

title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows
author: J.K. Rowling
description:
Harry Potter is leaving Privet Drive for the last time. But as he climbs into the sidecar of Hagrid’s motorbike and they take to the skies, he knows Lord Voldemort and the Death Eaters will not be far behind.

The protective charm that has kept him safe until now is broken. But the Dark Lord is...

title: The Wishing Spell
author: Chris Colfer
description: When twins Alex and Conner Bailey fall through their grandmother's magical book of fairy tales, they find themselves in a land where every story they have ever read is real. To find their way home, they must collect items from the most famous fairy tales, from Cinderella's glass slipper to a piece of Rapunzel's hair, and assemble the legendary Wishing Spell. But they are not the only ones searching for these magical objects, and a dangerous villain is close on their heels. This enchanting debut novel from Chris Colfer reimagines classic fairy tales in fresh and surprising ways, creating a world where happily-ever-after is just the beginning of the adventure.

title: The Enchantress Returns
author: Chris Colfer
description: Alex and Conner Bailey have not been back to the magical Land of Stories since their adventures in The Wishing Spell ended. But one night, they learn the famed Enchantress has kidnapped their mother! Against the will of their grandmother, the twins must find their own way into. The Land of Storie...

title: A Grimm Warning
author: Chris Colfer
description: Conner Bailey misses the fairy tale world and his twin sister Alex, who has stayed behind to train as a fairy godmother. When Conner discovers a mysterious clue left behind by the famous Brothers Grimm, he realizes that a terrible danger is approaching the Land of Stories from a most unexpected direction. A secret army from another century is planning to invade the fairy tale world, and Conner must find a way to warn his sister before it is too late. This third installment in the Land of Stories series blends real-world history with magical adventure in a thrilling story about the power of stories to connect us across time.

title: Beyond the Kingdoms
author: Chris Colfer
description: The Masked Man is on the loose in the Land of Stories, and he has a terrifying plan to recruit villains from other beloved fairy tales and classic stories. It is up to twins Alex and Conner Bailey to stop him, but Alex has been thrown off the Fairy Council and nobody will believe they are in danger. To track the Masked Man, the twins must journey beyond the fairy tale kingdoms and into the worlds of other famous stories, from Oz to Neverland. This fourth installment of the Land of Stories series expands the adventure to new literary worlds in a thrilling quest that celebrates the power of storytelling itself.

title: An Author's Odyssey
author: Chris Colfer
description: In the fifth book of the Land of Stories series, Alex and Conner Bailey face their most personal challenge yet when a dangerous enemy threatens to destroy both the fairy tale world and the real world. To fight back, the twins devise an audacious plan: they must recruit characters from the stories Conner has written himself. Venturing into Conner's own fictional creations, from pirate adventures to space odysseys, Alex and Conner assemble the most unlikely army imaginable. This wildly creative installment celebrates imagination and storytelling while delivering all the humor, heart, and adventure fans have come to love.

title: Worlds Collide
author: Chris Colfer
description: In the epic conclusion to the Land of Stories series, the boundaries between the fairy tale world and the real world have shattered, and characters from every story are spilling into modern-day cities. Alex and Conner Bailey must find a way to restore order before the chaos destroys both worlds, rallying every ally they have made across their incredible adventures. The twins face their most personal and dangerous challenge yet as they confront the ultimate villain and discover the true meaning of their grandmother's legacy. This thrilling finale brings together all the beloved characters in a celebration of storytelling, imagination, and the bonds of family.

title: Crazy Rich Asians
author: Kevin Kwan
description: When New Yorker Rachel Chu agrees to spend the summer in Singapore with her boyfriend Nick Young, she has no idea that his family is one of the wealthiest and most influential in all of Asia. Upon arrival, Rachel is thrust into a world of unimaginable luxury, jaw-dropping excess, and intense family drama as Nick's relatives scrutinize her every move. From private jets and palatial estates to scheming socialites and jealous ex-girlfriends, Rachel must navigate a minefield of old money snobbery and cultural expectations. This wickedly funny and utterly addictive novel is a satirical look at the lives of Asia's ultra-rich that will keep readers laughing and turning pages.

title: China Rich Girlfriend
author: Kevin Kwan
description: On the eve of Rachel Chu and Nick Young's wedding, a shocking revelation about Rachel's long-lost father threatens to upend everything and opens the door to an even more extravagant world of wealth and privilege in mainland China. As Rachel navigates her complicated new family connections, her friends find themselves embroiled in their own dramatic adventures across Asia's most exclusive playgrounds. The story takes readers from haute couture fashion shows in Paris to secret billionaire compounds in Shanghai in a whirlwind of comedy, romance, and over-the-top luxury. This delicious sequel to Crazy Rich Asians proves that when it comes to Asia's ultra-wealthy, the drama is never-ending and always entertaining.

title: A World Without Heroes
author: Brandon Mull
description: Jason Walker's ordinary life ends abruptly when he is swallowed by a hippopotamus at the zoo and transported to the magical world of Lyrian, a land under the iron rule of the evil wizard emperor Maldor. Jason discovers that the only way to defeat Maldor is to find the pieces of a secret word that holds the power to unmake the wizard, a quest that has defeated every hero who has attempted it. Along the way, he meets Rachel, a brave girl from his own world, and together they face deadly creatures, treacherous allies, and seemingly impossible challenges. This exciting first book in the Beyonders trilogy is a grand adventure filled with unique magic, memorable characters, and nonstop action.

title: Seeds of Rebellion
author: Brandon Mull
description: After barely escaping from Lyrian, Jason finds a way back and discovers that things have grown even more desperate under Maldor's tightening grip. Together with Rachel and a band of unlikely rebels, Jason must travel across the dangerous landscape of Lyrian to recruit allies and build an army capable of challenging the wizard emperor. The journey tests their courage and friendships at every turn as Maldor sends his deadliest agents to stop them. This thrilling sequel raises the stakes dramatically as the rebellion against Maldor takes shape and the true scale of the conflict becomes clear.

title: Chasing the Prophecy
author: Brandon Mull
description:
Jason and Rachel were not born in Lyrian. They did not grow up in Lyrian. But after all of the battles and losses, the triumphs and adventures, and most of all, the friendships forged in this fantastical world, Lyrian has become home to them in a way they never could have imagined.

And so, arm...

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Dawn of the Clans
title: The Sun Trail
author: Erin Hunter
description: High in the mountains, a tribe of cats faces starvation as prey grows scarce and the harsh seasons take their toll. A group of brave cats, led by the bold Gray Wing and his brother Clear Sky, decide to follow the sun trail to find a new home in the lush lands below. But the journey is perilous, and once they arrive, disagreements about territory and leadership begin to divide the settlers. This first Dawn of the Clans book reveals the thrilling origins of the warrior Clans in a tale of survival, brotherhood, and the difficult choices that shaped their future.

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Power of Three
title: The Sight
author: Erin Hunter
description:
There will be three, kin of your kin... who hold the power of the stars in their paws. 

The wild cats have flourished in their new home on the banks of the lake for several seasons, and the Clans are growing strong and healthy with new kits. Now, the time has come for three kits of ThunderClan...

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Power of Three
title: Dark River
author: Erin Hunter
description: Lionpaw, Hollypaw, and Jaypaw are training hard to become warriors, but each young cat harbors secrets that could tear the Clans apart. When Lionpaw discovers a network of underground tunnels, he is drawn into a forbidden friendship that crosses Clan boundaries. Meanwhile, tensions with WindClan are rising dangerously, and Jaypaw's mysterious visions hint at a darkness lurking just beneath the surface. This second book of the Power of Three arc deepens the mystery of the three siblings and their hidden connection to an ancient prophecy.

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Power of Three
title: Eclipse
author: Erin Hunter
description:
There will be three, kin of your kin... who hold the power of the stars in their paws. 

Firestar's three grandchildren have learned of the powerful prophecy that foretells their destinies, and the responsibility of deciding the Clans' future weighs heavily on the three apprentices. But each se...

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Power of Three
title: Long Shadows
author: Erin Hunter
description:
There will be three, kin of your kin... who hold the power of the stars in their paws. 

The Clans are in turmoil. ShadowClan has turned their backs on StarClan and pledged to follow the dark predictions of Sol, the strange cat who predicted the solar eclipse. But not all the cats have lost fai...

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Power of Three
title: Sunrise
author: Erin Hunter
description:
There will be three, kin of your kin... who hold the power of the stars in their paws.

A mysterious murder in the ranks has ripped ThunderClan apart. But more secrets still remain to be discovered.

Jayfeather is determined to find out who his real parents are. But he'll have to trample thro...

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Omen of the Stars
title: The Fourth Apprentice
author: Erin Hunter
description:
After the sharp-eyed Jay and the roaring Lion, peace will come... 

Four warrior Clans have shared the land around the lake as equals for many moons. But a prophecy foretells that three ThunderClan cats will hold the power of the stars in their paws. Jayfeather and Lionblaze know that they are ...

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Omen of the Stars
title: Fading Echoes
author: Erin Hunter
description: The aftermath of a devastating battle has left the Clans reeling, and Dovepaw is struggling with the weight of her extraordinary powers. As she trains under the watchful eye of her mentor Lionblaze, she discovers that the Dark Forest is recruiting warriors from among the living Clans. Jayfeather works to uncover the secrets of the past that might hold the key to defeating this growing threat. This second Omen of the Stars book builds tension masterfully as the invisible war between StarClan and the Dark Forest edges closer to open conflict.

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Omen of the Stars
title: Sign of the Moon
author: Erin Hunter
description:
The end of the stars draws near. Three must become four to battle the darkness that lasts forever.... 

The dark forces that have driven a rift between the four warrior Clans are growing stronger. Jayfeather, Lionblaze, and Dovepaw now know that unless they can unravel the true meaning behind t...

series_author_group: Erin Hunter — Warriors: Omen of the Stars
title: The Forgotten Warrior
author: Erin Hunter
description:
The end of the stars draws near. Three must become four to battle the darkness that lasts forever.... 

With a divided StarClan driving a treacherous rift between the four warrior Clans, the spirits of the Dark Forest are gaining strength. Ivypool's role as a spy becomes more dangerous with eac...

title: Moth Flight's Vision
author: Erin Hunter
description: Moth Flight is a young WindClan cat who feels out of place among her practical Clanmates because of her habit of chasing butterflies and daydreaming. When a mysterious green moth leads her on a journey to the Moonstone, she discovers that StarClan has chosen her to become the first-ever medicine cat. But this sacred role comes with a devastating rule that will change her life forever and shape the warrior code for generations. This Super Edition tells the moving origin story of the medicine cat tradition and is one of the most emotional Warriors books in the series.

title: Crowfeather's Trial
author: Erin Hunter
description: After the Great Battle against the Dark Forest, WindClan warrior Crowfeather must reckon with his complicated past and the relationships that have defined his life. When a new threat emerges from the tunnels beneath Clan territory, Crowfeather gets an unexpected chance to prove his loyalty to WindClan once and for all. He must also face the strained bond with his son Breezepelt and determine whether forgiveness is possible after so much pain. This Super Edition is a compelling character study that gives fans the deeper look at Crowfeather they have been waiting for.

title: The Dark Prophecy
author: Rick Riordan
description:
Go west. Capture Apollo before he can find the next oracle.
If you cannot bring him to me alive, kill him.

Those were the orders my old enemy Nero had given to Meg McCaffrey. But why would an ancient Roman emperor zero in on Indianapolis? And now that I have made it here (still in the embarra...

title: The Hidden Oracle
author: Rick Riordan
description:
How do you punish an immortal?

By making him human.

After angering his father Zeus, the god Apollo is cast down from Olympus. Weak and disorientated, he lands in New York City as a regular teenage boy. Now, without his godly powers, the four-thousand-year-old deity must learn to survive in...

title: The Burning Maze
author: Rick Riordan
description: The formerly glorious god Apollo, now trapped in the body of a mortal teenager named Lester Paganelli, must brave the Labyrinth to find the third Oracle and stop the burning of Southern California. Joined by his companions Meg McCaffrey and the sharpshooting Grover Underwood, Apollo faces his most dangerous and heartbreaking quest yet. The Burning Maze is guarded by the Roman Emperor Caligula, one of the most cruel and cunning villains Apollo has ever encountered. This third Trials of Apollo book takes the series in a darker direction with devastating consequences that will leave readers stunned.

title: The Tyrant's Tomb
author: Rick Riordan
description: A devastated but determined Apollo arrives at Camp Jupiter carrying the body of a fallen friend and bearing terrible news about the growing threat of the Roman emperors. He must help the Roman demigods defend their home against an army of undead soldiers led by the tyrant Tarquin while also unraveling a series of ancient prophecies. Apollo grows closer to understanding what he must sacrifice to regain his godhood, and the cost may be higher than he ever imagined. This fourth Trials of Apollo book is a moving and action-packed adventure that sets the stage for the series' epic conclusion.

title: The Tower of Nero
author: Rick Riordan
description:
It's time to face the final trial . . .

The battle for Camp Jupiter is over. New Rome is safe. Tarquin and his army of the undead have been defeated. Somehow Apollo has made it out alive, with a little bit of help from the Hunters of Artemis.

But though the battle may have been won, the war...

title: Jake Atlas and the Tomb of the Emerald Snake
author: Rob Lloyd Jones
description: In the second Jake Atlas adventure, Jake and his treasure-hunting family follow a trail of ancient clues deep into the treacherous jungles of Central America in search of the legendary Tomb of the Emerald Snake. The artifact they seek holds immense power, and they are not the only ones hunting for it. Rival treasure seekers, deadly traps, and the mysteries of a lost civilization stand between the Atlas family and their goal. Packed with nonstop action, exotic locations, and family teamwork, this globe-trotting adventure will keep readers on the edge of their seats from start to finish.

title: Jake Atlas and the Keys of the Apocalypse
author: Rob Lloyd Jones
description: In the third and most thrilling Jake Atlas adventure, Jake and his family face a race against time to find the legendary Keys of the Apocalypse before they fall into the wrong hands. The ancient artifacts have the power to unleash catastrophic destruction, and a dangerous enemy is closing in fast. From hidden temples to underground labyrinths, the Atlas family must solve their most challenging puzzles yet while battling foes at every turn. This explosive conclusion to the trilogy raises the stakes to world-ending proportions in a nonstop adventure perfect for young thrill-seekers.

title: Story Thieves
author: James Riley
description: Owen Conners is a kid who wishes his life were more exciting, until the day he witnesses his classmate Bethany literally jump out of a book in the school library. It turns out Bethany is half-fictional, able to travel in and out of any book she wants, and she has been secretly searching for her missing father who disappeared into a story years ago. When Owen convinces Bethany to take him into his favorite book series, their adventure quickly spirals out of control and threatens to destroy the boundary between fiction and reality. This wildly imaginative first book in the Story Thieves series is a love letter to reading that will delight anyone who has ever wished they could live inside their favorite story.

title: The Stolen Chapters
author: James Riley
description: Owen Conners wakes up in a strange building with no memory of how he got there or even who he is. Alongside the boy magician Kiel Gnomenfoot and their half-fictional friend Bethany, Owen must piece together what happened from scattered clues and stolen memories. A mysterious new villain has trapped them in a devious puzzle, and the only way out is to solve the mystery before time runs out. This clever second installment in the Story Thieves series is told as a detective story within a story, full of hidden clues, surprising twists, and some very familiar fictional faces.

title: Pick the Plot
author: James Riley
description: Owen has been trapped inside a time travel choose-your-own-adventure book, where the reader controls his every move and his fate hangs in the balance with each page turn. His only ally is Kara Dox, a bizarre and unpredictable fellow prisoner who seems to know more about the fictional world than she lets on. Meanwhile, Bethany is in terrible danger, and Owen must find a way to break free from the reader's control and escape the book to save her. This wildly inventive fourth installment in the Story Thieves series puts the reader literally in charge of the story, making for a uniquely interactive and thrilling adventure.

title: Secret Origins
author: James Riley
description: Owen and Bethany journey into Jupiter City, a comic book world trapped in permanent darkness by a mysterious villain called the Dark. With the help of old friends and new allies, they fight to restore light to the city and discover a shocking connection between the Dark and Bethany's long-lost father, who disappeared into the fictional world years ago. As they dig deeper into the mystery, Bethany must confront painful truths about her family and the nature of fiction itself. This action-packed third installment in the Story Thieves series delivers superhero thrills alongside an emotional story about identity and belonging.

title: Worlds Apart
author: James Riley
description: In the epic conclusion to the Story Thieves series, the boundary between the fictional and real worlds is crumbling, and Owen and Bethany must find a way to save both before everything falls apart. The mysterious Nobody has set a terrifying plan in motion that threatens to erase all of fiction, taking every beloved character and story with it. Owen and Bethany must confront their deepest fears and make impossible choices as they race to stop the destruction. This thrilling finale brings together characters from across the series in a celebration of the power of stories and the courage it takes to write your own ending.

series_author_group: James Riley — Half Upon a Time
title: Half Upon a Time
author: James Riley
description: Life’s no fairy tale for Jack. After all, his father's been missing ever since that incident with the beanstalk and the giant, and his grandfather keeps pushing him to get out and find a princess to rescue. Who'd want to rescue a snobby, entitled princess anyway? Especially one that falls out of ...

series_author_group: James Riley — Half Upon a Time
title: Twice Upon a Time
author: James Riley
description: In the second book of the Half Upon a Time trilogy, Jack continues his unlikely quest with the reluctant princess May and her protector, a prince who is not quite what he seems. Their search for May's family leads them to an enchanted city full of fairies that has fallen under a terrible nameless curse, and they may be the only ones who can break it. Along the way, they encounter familiar fairy tale characters in surprising new roles, and Jack must confront secrets about his own family's legendary past. This witty and fast-paced adventure puts clever new spins on classic fairy tales while building toward an even bigger mystery.

series_author_group: James Riley — Half Upon a Time
title: Once Upon the End
author: James Riley
description: In the thrilling conclusion to the Half Upon a Time trilogy, Jack and his friends must face the ultimate fairy tale villain in a battle that will decide the fate of every story ever told. The mysterious Fairy Homelands are under siege, and Jack, May, and Phillip find themselves caught between armies of knights, giants, and magical creatures in an all-out war. With the prophecy pointing to a devastating ending, Jack must find a way to rewrite the rules and save everyone he cares about. This action-packed finale is filled with clever twists on classic fairy tales, laugh-out-loud humor, and a heartfelt message about choosing your own destiny.

title: Space Case
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: Twelve-year-old Dashiell Gibson is one of the first humans to live on Moon Base Alpha, humanity's first permanent settlement on the lunar surface. Life on the moon is cramped, boring, and full of dehydrated food, but everything changes when the base's most prominent doctor turns up dead. With the base's tiny population of suspects all living in close quarters and no way to call for help from Earth, Dash takes it upon himself to investigate the murder. This exciting mystery set in space combines futuristic science fiction with a classic whodunit, proving that even on the moon, someone can get away with murder if a clever kid does not step in.

title: Spaced Out
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: In the year 2041, twelve-year-old Dashiell Gibson is one of the few residents of Moon Base Alpha, humanity's first permanent lunar settlement, when the base commander mysteriously vanishes without a trace. With limited suspects and nowhere to hide on the cramped lunar facility, Dash launches an investigation that uncovers surprising secrets about his fellow moonies. Meanwhile, an exciting discovery beneath the lunar surface could change everything humanity knows about the moon. This second Moon Base Alpha mystery combines science fiction wonder with clever detective work in a story that is both funny and thrilling.

title: Waste of Space
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: In the third and final installment of the Moon Base Alpha series, Dash Gibson faces his biggest challenge yet when a series of catastrophic events threaten to destroy the entire lunar base. As systems fail and suspicions mount, Dash must determine whether the crisis is caused by mechanical failure, sabotage, or something even more sinister. With the lives of every colonist hanging in the balance and no help coming from Earth, Dash races against time to uncover the truth. This gripping conclusion to the trilogy delivers all the humor, mystery, and scientific wonder that fans have come to expect.

title: Tyrannosaurus Wrecks
author: Stuart Gibbs
description: When a priceless 550-pound tyrannosaur skull mysteriously vanishes from a nearby ranch, Teddy Fitzroy is once again called upon to solve a seemingly impossible crime. The skull is worth millions of dollars, making it a tempting target for collectors and criminals alike, and the list of suspects is long. Complicating matters, J.J. McCracken, the powerful owner of FunJungle and Teddy's friend Summer's father, has landed squarely on the suspect list. Teddy must navigate a maze of red herrings, shady deals, and paleontological intrigue to crack the case before the fossil disappears forever.

series_author_group: Shannon Messenger — Keeper of the Lost Cities
title: Lodestar
author: Shannon Messenger
description: Sophie Foster returns to the Lost Cities to find that the threat of the Neverseen has cast a dark shadow over the elvin world, and no one seems safe anymore. When a devastating attack rocks the Lost Cities, Sophie and her friends must go further than ever before to uncover the Neverseen's endgame. New abilities emerge, alliances shift, and the secrets Sophie has been chasing begin to fall into place in unexpected and frightening ways. This fifth Keeper of the Lost Cities book is packed with jaw-dropping revelations and game-changing moments that will leave readers reeling.

series_author_group: Shannon Messenger — Keeper of the Lost Cities
title: Nightfall
author: Shannon Messenger
description:
Sophie Foster is struggling. Grieving. Scrambling. But she knows one thing: she will not be defeated.

The Neverseen have had their victories—but the battle is far from over. It’s time to change tactics. Make sacrifices. Reexamine everything. Maybe even time for Sophie to trust her enemies.

...

title: Atlantis Rising
author: T.A. Barron
description: In this epic fantasy adventure, a young hero named Promi discovers that the legendary lost world of Atlantis is not just a myth but a real place with extraordinary secrets. When dark forces threaten to destroy this magical realm before it has even begun to flourish, Promi must find the courage to stand against an ancient evil. Along the way, he encounters mystical creatures, powerful magic, and a young woman named Atlanta whose destiny is intertwined with his own. T.A. Barron weaves a sweeping origin story for one of mythology's greatest legends, filled with wonder, danger, and the power of hope.

series_author_group: Susan Cooper — The Dark Is Rising
title: The Dark Is Rising
author: Susan Cooper
description: On his eleventh birthday, Will Stanton discovers that he is no ordinary boy but the last of the Old Ones, an ancient group of warriors dedicated to fighting the forces of the Dark. He must find and unite the six magical Signs of the Light, powerful talismans scattered across time that are the only hope of turning back the rising tide of evil. As winter grips the English countryside in an unnatural cold, Will's quest takes him through past and present, where he encounters allies and enemies in a struggle that has raged since the dawn of time. This Newbery Honor-winning classic is a masterful blend of Arthurian legend, English folklore, and thrilling fantasy adventure.

series_author_group: Susan Cooper — The Dark Is Rising
title: Over Sea, Under Stone
author: Susan Cooper
description: On holiday in Cornwall, siblings Simon, Jane, and Barney Drew discover an ancient map hidden in the attic of the old house where they are staying with their mysterious great-uncle Merriman. The map leads to a powerful treasure connected to King Arthur, and the children soon find themselves in a dangerous race against sinister agents of the Dark who will stop at nothing to claim it. With only their wits and their uncle's cryptic guidance to help them, the Drew children must solve ancient riddles and brave real danger in the Cornish countryside. This classic first book in the Dark Is Rising sequence is a timeless tale of mystery, legend, and the eternal struggle between Light and Dark.

series_author_group: Susan Cooper — The Dark Is Rising
title: Greenwitch
author: Susan Cooper
description: Simon, Jane, and Barney Drew return to Cornwall with their great-uncle Merriman after the precious grail they discovered is stolen by agents of the Dark. They arrive just in time for the ancient ceremony of the Greenwitch, a massive figure woven from branches and thrown into the sea as an offering each spring. Jane makes a secret wish upon the Greenwitch that sets in motion a chain of events no one expected, and the children must recover the grail before the Dark can use it to tip the balance of power in their favor. This atmospheric third book in the Dark Is Rising sequence weaves Cornish folklore and Arthurian legend into a compelling and mysterious adventure.

series_author_group: Susan Cooper — The Dark Is Rising
title: The Grey King
author: Susan Cooper
